title: Large Language Model-based Recommendation System Agents
abstract: A Large Language Model-based agent is an AI assistant that makes use of advanced Tool Calling (TC) and Retrieval Augmented Generation (RAG) techniques to access external tools (e.g., Python code, databases). This allows the agent to consult additional sources of information that are complementary to its pre-trained knowledge. By doing so, re-training or fine-tuning of the LLM each time new knowledge becomes available can be avoided, as the assistant can access this information thanks to the available tools. In this demo, we investigate this idea in the Recommendation Systems (RSs) scenario. In particular, we design an AI assistant for recommendation that can access (i) a pre-trained recommender system, (ii) a database, and (iii) a vector store. The demo shows how the assistant is able to interact with these tools to reply to complex recommendation and explanation queries that require reasoning on the tool’s results. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first attempt at designing LLM-based recommendation system agents. The code for this demo paper is available at this URL1.
semantic_scholar_tldr: This work designs an AI assistant for recommendation that can access a pre-trained recommender system, a database, and a vector store, and shows how the assistant is able to interact with these tools to reply to complex recommendation and explanation queries that require reasoning on the tool’s results.
tldr: 该论文首次尝试设计基于LLM的推荐系统智能体，通过工具调用和RAG技术访问预训练推荐系统、数据库和向量存储，以处理复杂的推荐和解释查询。
abstract_cn: 基于大语言模型的智能体是一种人工智能助手，它利用先进的工具调用（Tool Calling, TC）与检索增强生成（Retrieval Augmented Generation, RAG）技术来访问外部工具（例如Python代码、数据库）。这使得智能体能够查询与其预训练知识互补的额外信息来源。通过这种方式，每当新知识出现时，可以避免对大语言模型进行重新训练或微调，因为助手能够借助现有工具获取这些信息。在本演示中，我们于推荐系统（Recommendation Systems, RSs）场景下探究了这一思路。具体而言，我们设计了一款用于推荐的AI助手，它能够访问（i）一个预训练的推荐系统，（ii）一个数据库，以及（iii）一个向量存储库。该演示展示了助手如何与这些工具交互，以回应需要对工具结果进行推理的复杂推荐与解释查询。据我们所知，这是设计基于大语言模型的推荐系统智能体的首次尝试。本演示论文的代码可通过此URL1获取。

analysis.chinese_title: 基于大语言模型的推荐系统智能体
analysis.summary: 本文提出一种基于大语言模型（LLM）的推荐系统智能体，利用工具调用（TC）和检索增强生成（RAG）技术访问外部工具（如Python代码、数据库），从而避免每次新知识出现时重新训练或微调LLM。该智能体可访问预训练的推荐系统、数据库和向量存储，通过推理工具结果来回答复杂的推荐和解释查询。这是首次尝试设计基于LLM的推荐系统智能体，代码已公开。

title: Unleash LLMs Potential for Sequential Recommendation by Coordinating Dual Dynamic Index Mechanism
abstract: Owing to the unprecedented capability in semantic understanding and logical reasoning, large language models (LLMs) have shown fantastic potential in developing next-generation sequential recommender systems (RSs). However, existing LLM-based sequential RSs mostly separate index generation from sequential recommendation, leading to insufficient integration between semantic information and collaborative information. On the other hand, the neglect of user-related information hinders LLM-based sequential RSs from exploiting high-order user-item interaction patterns. In this paper, we propose the End-to-End Dual Dynamic (ED2) recommender, the first LLM-based sequential RS which adopts dual dynamic index mechanism, targeting resolving the above limitations simultaneously. The dual dynamic index mechanism can not only assembly index generation and sequential recommendation into a unified LLM-backbone pipeline, but also make it practical for LLM-based sequential recommender to take advantage of user-related information. Specifically, to facilitate the LLM comprehension ability to dual dynamic index, we propose a multigrained token regulator which constructs alignment supervision based on LLMs semantic knowledge across multiple representation granularities. Moreover, the associated user collection data and a series of novel instruction tuning tasks are specially customized to capture the high-order user-item interaction patterns. Extensive experiments on three public datasets demonstrate the superiority of ED2, achieving an average improvement of 19.62% in Hit-Rate and 21.11% in NDCG.
semantic_scholar_tldr: This paper proposes the End-to-End Dual Dynamic (ED2) recommender, the first LLM-based sequential RS which adopts dual dynamic index mechanism, targeting resolving the above limitations simultaneously.

code_repositories.description: Unleash LLMs Potential for Sequential Recommendation by Coordinating Dual Dynamic Index Mechanism. WebConf 2025 (Oral).

tldr: 提出ED2推荐器，通过双动态索引机制将索引生成与序列推荐统一到LLM管道中，并利用用户相关信息，在三个数据集上平均提升Hit-Rate 19.62%和NDCG 21.11%。
abstract_cn: 由于大语言模型（LLMs）在语义理解与逻辑推理方面展现出前所未有的能力，其在开发下一代序列推荐系统（RSs）中已显示出巨大潜力。然而，现有基于LLM的序列推荐系统大多将索引生成与序列推荐分离，导致语义信息与协同信息整合不足。另一方面，对用户相关信息的忽视阻碍了基于LLM的序列推荐系统利用高阶用户-物品交互模式。本文提出端到端双动态（ED2）推荐器，这是首个采用双动态索引机制的基于LLM的序列推荐系统，旨在同时解决上述局限性。双动态索引机制不仅能够将索引生成与序列推荐整合至统一的LLM主干流水线中，还能使基于LLM的序列推荐系统有效利用用户相关信息。具体而言，为增强LLM对双动态索引的理解能力，我们提出多粒度令牌调节器，该调节器基于LLM的语义知识在多个表示粒度上构建对齐监督。此外，我们专门定制了关联用户集合数据及一系列新型指令微调任务，以捕获高阶用户-物品交互模式。在三个公开数据集上的大量实验证明了ED2的优越性，其在命中率（Hit-Rate）上平均提升19.62%，在归一化折损累计增益（NDCG）上平均提升21.11%。

analysis.chinese_title: 通过协调双动态索引机制释放LLM在序列推荐中的潜力

title: Joint Similarity Item Exploration and Overlapped User Guidance for Multi-Modal Cross-Domain Recommendation
abstract: Cross-Domain Recommendation (CDR) has been widely investi- gated for solving long-standing data sparsity problem via knowl- edge sharing across domains. In this paper, we focus on the Multi- Modal Cross-Domain Recommendation (MMCDR) problem where different items have multi-modal information while few users are overlapped across domains. MMCDR is particularly challenging in two aspects: fully exploiting diverse multi-modal information within each domain and leveraging useful knowledge transfer across domains. However, previous methods fail to cluster items with similar characteristics while filtering out inherit noises within different modalities, hurdling the model performance. What is worse, conventional CDR models primarily rely on overlapped users for domain adaptation, making them ill-equipped to handle scenarios where the majority of users are non-overlapped. To fill this gap, we propose Joint Similarity Item Exploration and Overlapped User Guidance (SIEOUG) for solving the MMCDR problem. SIEOUG first proposes similarity item exploration module, which not only obtains pair-wise and group-wise item-item graph knowledge, but also reduces irrelevant noise for multi-modal modeling. Then SIEOUG proposes user-item collaborative filtering module to aggregate user/item embeddings with the attention mechanism for collaborative filtering. Finally SIEOUG proposes overlapped user guidance module with optimal user matching for knowledge sharing across domains. Our empirical study on Amazon dataset with several different tasks demonstrates that SIEOUG significantly outperforms the state-of-the-art models under the MMCDR setting.
semantic_scholar_tldr: SIEOUG first proposes similarity item exploration module, which not only obtains pair-wise and group-wise item-item graph knowledge, but also reduces irrelevant noise for multi-modal modeling, and SIEOUG proposes overlapped user guidance module with optimal user matching for knowledge sharing across domains.
tldr: 该论文提出SIEOUG方法，通过相似物品探索和重叠用户引导解决多模态跨域推荐中的数据稀疏和模态噪声问题，在Amazon数据集上显著优于现有模型。
abstract_cn: 跨域推荐（Cross-Domain Recommendation, CDR）通过跨领域知识共享来解决长期存在的数据稀疏问题，已得到广泛研究。本文聚焦于多模态跨域推荐（Multi-Modal Cross-Domain Recommendation, MMCDR）问题，其中不同项目具有多模态信息，而跨域重叠用户极少。MMCDR的挑战主要体现在两个方面：充分挖掘每个领域内多样化的多模态信息，以及利用跨领域的有效知识迁移。然而，现有方法未能对具有相似特征的项目进行聚类，同时难以滤除不同模态中的固有噪声，从而阻碍了模型性能。更严重的是，传统CDR模型主要依赖重叠用户进行领域适配，导致其难以应对大多数用户非重叠的场景。为弥补这一不足，我们提出联合相似项目探索与重叠用户引导（Joint Similarity Item Exploration and Overlapped User Guidance, SIEOUG）方法来解决MMCDR问题。SIEOUG首先提出相似项目探索模块，该模块不仅能获取成对和成组的项目-项目图知识，还能减少多模态建模中的无关噪声。随后，SIEOUG提出用户-项目协同过滤模块，通过注意力机制聚合用户/项目嵌入以实现协同过滤。最后，SIEOUG提出带有最优用户匹配的重叠用户引导模块，用于跨领域知识共享。我们在Amazon数据集上针对多个不同任务进行的实证研究表明，在MMCDR设定下，SIEOUG显著优于当前最先进的模型。

analysis.chinese_title: 联合相似项目探索与重叠用户引导的多模态跨域推荐
analysis.summary: 跨域推荐（CDR）通过跨域知识共享解决数据稀疏问题。本文聚焦多模态跨域推荐（MMCDR），其中项目具有多模态信息但跨域重叠用户较少。现有方法难以充分挖掘多模态信息并过滤噪声，且依赖重叠用户进行域适应，在非重叠用户占多数时效果不佳。为此，本文提出SIEOUG方法，包含相似项目探索模块（获取成对和分组项目图知识并减少噪声）、用户项目协同过滤模块（利用注意力机制聚合嵌入）以及重叠用户引导模块（通过最优用户匹配实现跨域知识共享）。在Amazon数据集上的实验表明，SIEOUG显著优于现有模型。
innovations: 提出相似项目探索模块，同时获取成对和分组项目图知识，并减少多模态建模中的无关噪声
设计用户项目协同过滤模块，利用注意力机制聚合用户和项目嵌入
提出重叠用户引导模块，通过最优用户匹配实现跨域知识共享，缓解非重叠用户主导场景下的域适应问题
analysis.methodology: SIEOUG包含三个模块：1）相似项目探索模块，构建成对和分组项目图并降噪；2）用户项目协同过滤模块，使用注意力机制聚合嵌入；3）重叠用户引导模块，通过最优用户匹配进行跨域知识共享。整体框架联合优化。
analysis.key_results: 在Amazon数据集上的多个任务中，SIEOUG显著优于最先进模型。
analysis.tech_stack: 摘要未提供具体算法、工具或数学方法名称。
strengths: 同时利用成对和分组项目图知识，增强多模态信息利用
通过注意力机制实现协同过滤，提升嵌入质量
引入最优用户匹配，有效处理非重叠用户占多数的场景

limitations.paper_limitations: 摘要未提及论文自身局限。
limitations.evidence_limitations: 当前仅基于摘要，缺乏实验细节、数据集规模、基线模型名称、消融实验等具体信息。

title: Personalized Federated Recommendation for Cold-Start Users via Adaptive Knowledge Fusion
abstract: Federated Recommendation System (FRS) usually offers recommendation services for users while keeping their data locally to ensure privacy. Currently, most FRS literature assumes that fixed users participate in federated training with personal IoT devices (e.g., mobile phones and PC). However, users may join incrementally, and retraining the entire FRS for each new participating user is unfeasible due to the high training costs and the limited global knowledge contribution from a small number of new users. To guarantee the quality service for these new users, we take a dive into the federated recommendation for cold-start users, a novel scenario where the new participating users can directly obtain a promising recommendation without comprehensive training with all participating users by leveraging both transferred knowledge from the converged warm clients and the knowledge learned from the local data.
semantic_scholar_tldr: This work takes a dive into the federated recommendation for cold-start users, a novel scenario where the new participating users can directly obtain a promising recommendation without comprehensive training with all participating users by leveraging both transferred knowledge from the converged warm clients and the knowledge learned from the local data.
tldr: 针对联邦推荐中冷启动用户，提出通过自适应知识融合利用已收敛的温客户端知识和本地数据，无需全面训练即可为新用户提供优质推荐。
abstract_cn: 联邦推荐系统（Federated Recommendation System, FRS）通常为用户提供推荐服务，同时将用户数据保留在本地以确保隐私。目前，大多数联邦推荐系统文献假设固定用户通过个人物联网设备（如手机和个人电脑）参与联邦训练。然而，用户可能会逐步加入，而为每个新参与用户重新训练整个联邦推荐系统并不可行，原因在于训练成本高昂，且少量新用户对全局知识的贡献有限。为了保障这些新用户获得高质量服务，我们深入研究了面向冷启动用户的联邦推荐问题。在这一新颖场景中，新参与用户无需与所有参与用户进行全面训练，即可通过利用来自已收敛的热启动客户端（warm clients）的迁移知识以及从本地数据中学习到的知识，直接获得有前景的推荐结果。

title: Generative Recommendation: Towards Personalized Multimodal Content Generation
abstract: Traditional recommender systems primarily retrieve items from a pre-defined item corpus for personalized recommendations. However, this a retrieval-based paradigm faces two major constraints: 1) the existing item corpus with human-generated items may not adequately satisfy users' diverse information needs, and 2) users often rely on passive and noisy feedback (e.g., clicks) to refine the recommendations. To overcome the limitations, the rapid advancement of AI-Generated Content (AIGC) presents significant potential: 1) generative AI promotes the creation of personalized multimodal content as new items to satisfy users' information needs, and 2) large language models reduce the efforts of users to express information needs proactively in natural language. In this light, we propose a novel Generative Recommender paradigm named GeneRec with two objectives: 1) generating personalized multimodal content, and 2) integrating proactive user instructions to guide content generation. To achieve the objectives, GeneRec introduces an AI generator to personalize multimodal content generation and leverages user instructions to obtain users' information needs. Specifically, GeneRec first employs an instructor to pre-process users' instructions and traditional feedback (e.g., clicks) to extract generation guidance. Following the guidance, we develop the AI generator with an AI editor to edit existing items and an AI creator to create new items, respectively. Lastly, we study the feasibility of implementing the AI creator in the fashion domain, showing promising results. Furthermore, to ensure the trustworthiness of the generated items, we emphasize various trustworthiness checks such as fairness and safety checks.
semantic_scholar_tldr: The proposed GeneRec introduces an AI generator to personalize multimodal content generation and leverages user instructions to obtain users' information needs and emphasizes various trustworthiness checks such as fairness and safety checks.
tldr: 该论文提出GeneRec生成式推荐范式，利用AI生成多模态内容并整合用户指令，以突破传统检索式推荐的局限，并在时尚领域验证了可行性。
abstract_cn: 传统推荐系统主要从预定义的项目库中检索内容以进行个性化推荐。然而，这种基于检索的范式面临两大限制：1）现有由人工生成的项目库可能无法充分满足用户多样化的信息需求；2）用户通常依赖被动且带有噪声的反馈（例如点击）来优化推荐结果。为克服这些局限，人工智能生成内容（AI-Generated Content, AIGC）的快速发展展现出巨大潜力：1）生成式AI能够促进创建个性化多模态内容作为新项目，以满足用户的信息需求；2）大型语言模型降低了用户主动用自然语言表达信息需求的难度。基于此，我们提出一种名为GeneRec的新型生成式推荐范式，其目标包括：1）生成个性化多模态内容；2）整合用户主动指令以指导内容生成。为实现这些目标，GeneRec引入AI生成器来个性化生成多模态内容，并利用用户指令获取其信息需求。具体而言，GeneRec首先使用指令处理器对用户指令及传统反馈（如点击）进行预处理，以提取生成指导信息。随后，我们开发了包含AI编辑器和AI创建器的AI生成器，分别用于编辑现有项目与创建新项目。最后，我们在时尚领域验证了AI创建器的可行性，并取得了令人鼓舞的结果。此外，为确保生成内容的可信度，我们强调了多种可信度检查机制，例如公平性检查与安全性检查。

analysis.chinese_title: 生成式推荐：迈向个性化多模态内容生成
analysis.summary: 传统推荐系统主要从预定义物品库中检索物品，但存在两个局限：现有物品库可能无法充分满足用户多样化的信息需求，且用户依赖被动且嘈杂的反馈（如点击）来优化推荐。随着AI生成内容（AIGC）的快速发展，生成式AI能够创建个性化多模态内容作为新物品，大语言模型也降低了用户主动表达信息需求的难度。为此，本文提出名为GeneRec的新型生成式推荐范式，目标包括：生成个性化多模态内容，以及整合主动用户指令以指导内容生成。GeneRec引入AI生成器来个性化多模态内容生成，并利用用户指令获取信息需求。具体地，GeneRec首先使用指令处理器预处理用户指令和传统反馈（如点击）以提取生成指导；然后开发AI生成器，包括编辑现有物品的AI编辑器和创建新物品的AI创建器；最后在时尚领域验证了AI创建器的可行性，结果令人鼓舞。此外，为确保生成物品的可信度，强调了公平性和安全性等可信度检查。
innovations: 提出生成式推荐范式GeneRec，突破传统检索式推荐局限，直接生成个性化多模态内容。
整合主动用户指令（自然语言）与传统被动反馈（如点击），实现更精准的信息需求获取。
设计双模块AI生成器：AI编辑器（修改现有物品）和AI创建器（生成全新物品），覆盖不同生成场景。
在时尚领域验证AI创建器可行性，并强调生成物品的可信度检查（公平性、安全性）。
analysis.methodology: 论文提出GeneRec框架，包含三个核心组件：1）指令处理器：预处理用户指令和传统反馈（如点击），提取生成指导；2）AI生成器：包括AI编辑器（基于指导修改现有物品）和AI创建器（基于指导生成全新物品）；3）可信度检查：对生成物品进行公平性和安全性等检查。在时尚领域进行AI创建器的可行性实验。
analysis.key_results: 在时尚领域实现AI创建器的可行性研究，结果显示该方法具有前景。具体实验数字、数据集、基线等摘要未提供。
analysis.tech_stack: AI生成器（可能基于生成对抗网络或扩散模型等，但摘要未明确）、大语言模型（用于处理用户指令）、指令处理器（自然语言处理技术）、可信度检查方法（公平性、安全性评估）。具体算法、工具、数学方法摘要未提供。
strengths: 创新性地将生成式AI引入推荐系统，突破检索式范式，可满足用户多样化信息需求。
融合主动指令与被动反馈，提升用户意图理解的准确性。
双模块生成器设计灵活，兼顾编辑与创造。
关注生成物品的可信度，体现负责任的AI理念。
limitations: 论文局限：仅验证了时尚领域的AI创建器，其他领域及AI编辑器的效果未提及。
当前证据局限：摘要未提供具体实验数据、基线对比、消融实验等，无法评估方法实际性能。
当前证据局限：未讨论生成内容的质量控制、计算成本、用户隐私等潜在问题。
analysis.relevance_to_keywords: 高度相关：论文聚焦生成式推荐（生成式推荐）、结合大语言模型（LLM与推荐系统结合）、涉及多模态内容（多模态推荐）、用户指令交互（对话式推荐）、以及可信度（公平性、鲁棒性）。

title: Conf-GNNRec: Quantifying and Calibrating the Prediction Confidence for GNN-based Recommendation Methods
abstract: Recommender systems based on graph neural networks perform well in tasks such as rating and ranking. However, in real-world recommendation scenarios, noise such as user misuse and malicious advertisement gradually accumulates through the message propagation mechanism. Even if existing studies mitigate their effects by reducing the noise propagation weights, the severe sparsity of the recommender system still leads to the low-weighted noisy neighbors being mistaken as meaningful information, and the prediction result obtained based on the polluted nodes is not entirely trustworthy. Therefore, it is crucial to measure the confidence of the prediction results in this highly noisy framework. Furthermore, our evaluation of the existing representative GNN-based recommendation shows that it suffers from overconfidence. Based on the above considerations, we propose a new method to quantify and calibrate the prediction confidence of GNN-based recommendations (Conf-GNNRec). Specifically, we propose a rating calibration method that dynamically adjusts excessive ratings to mitigate overconfidence based on user personalization. We also design a confidence loss function to reduce the overconfidence of negative samples and effectively improve recommendation performance. Experiments on public datasets demonstrate the validity of Conf-GNNRec in prediction confidence and recommendation performance.
semantic_scholar_tldr: A rating calibration method that dynamically adjusts excessive ratings to mitigate overconfidence based on user personalization is proposed and a confidence loss function is designed to reduce the overconfidence of negative samples and effectively improve recommendation performance.
topics: Radiomics and Machine Learning in Medical Imaging
tldr: 针对图神经网络推荐系统存在的过自信问题，提出Conf-GNNRec方法，通过评分校准和置信度损失函数量化并校准预测置信度，提升推荐性能。
abstract_cn: 基于图神经网络的推荐系统在评分与排序等任务中表现优异。然而，在真实推荐场景中，用户误操作与恶意广告等噪声会通过消息传播机制逐渐累积。尽管现有研究通过降低噪声传播权重来减轻其影响，但推荐系统严重的稀疏性仍会导致低权重噪声邻居被误判为有效信息，且基于受污染节点获得的预测结果并非完全可信。因此，在高噪声框架下衡量预测结果的置信度至关重要。此外，我们对现有代表性基于图神经网络的推荐方法进行评估后发现，其存在过度自信问题。基于上述考量，我们提出了一种量化与校准基于图神经网络的推荐预测置信度的新方法（Conf-GNNRec）。具体而言，我们提出了一种评分校准方法，该方法基于用户个性化动态调整过度评分以缓解过度自信；同时设计了一种置信度损失函数，以降低负样本的过度自信程度，从而有效提升推荐性能。在公开数据集上的实验验证了Conf-GNNRec在预测置信度与推荐性能方面的有效性。

title: Score-Only Distillation for Compact Dense Retrieval
abstract: Large embedding models improve retrieval quality, but serving large encoders online is expensive. We study whether a compact retriever can learn teacher ranking behavior from score vectors without access to teacher hidden states. The student trains on rows built from ground-truth positives and negative candidates produced by our data generation pipeline; we evaluate student-teacher hard-negative mining separately as an extension. We use a row-centered score-vector objective, a memory-efficient implementation of uniform all-pairs PairMSE loss. On a fixed eight-task evaluation panel, our distillation protocol recovers up to 50\% of the base-to-teacher gap. The distilled 0.6B student is 4.7$\times$ faster for query encoding and 9.7$\times$ faster for document encoding than sequential online teacher fusion. External-transfer performance after distillation remains mixed, so our evidence supports compression of teacher rankings under matched retrieval protocols.
tldr: 论文研究如何通过分数蒸馏训练紧凑的密集检索器，以在保持检索质量的同时提升推理速度，实验表明该方法能恢复教师模型性能差距的50%。
abstract_cn: 大型嵌入模型能够提升检索质量，但在线部署大型编码器的成本高昂。本文研究紧凑型检索器能否在不访问教师模型隐藏状态的情况下，通过得分向量学习教师模型的排序行为。学生模型基于由真实正例及我们数据生成流水线产生的负例候选所构成的行进行训练；我们将学生-教师难负例挖掘作为扩展任务单独评估。我们采用以行为中心的得分向量目标函数，该函数是统一全配对PairMSE损失的一种内存高效实现。在固定的八任务评估面板上，我们的蒸馏协议可恢复基线与教师模型之间差距的50%。蒸馏后的0.6B参数学生模型在查询编码速度上比顺序在线教师融合快4.7倍，在文档编码速度上快9.7倍。蒸馏后的外部迁移性能仍存在差异，因此我们的证据支持在匹配的检索协议下对教师排序进行压缩。

title: PaperRouter-Agent: A Content-Grounded LLM Agent for Personalized Hierarchical Paper Routing
abstract: Researchers organize the papers they collect into personal folder hierarchies in reference managers, and route each new paper into the folder where it belongs. This task differs from standard hierarchical text classification. A user's folder hierarchy is not a fixed, shared taxonomy but a private and evolving folksonomy whose folder meanings may be topical, shorthand, venue-based, or process-oriented, and are often defined by the papers already stored inside them. We formalize this setting as personalized hierarchical paper routing (PHPR): assigning an incoming paper to folders in a user-specific hierarchy without per-user training. We propose PaperRouter-Agent, a training-free LLM agent that grounds routing decisions in folder members rather than folder names alone. The agent first narrows the candidate hierarchy, retrieves folder-specific evidence, verifies fit by inspecting member papers, and incorporates similarity-gated feedback from past user rejections. A formative study on real personal libraries shows that PaperRouter-Agent raises overall Recall@1 from 0.39 to 0.61 and Recall@3 from 0.57 to 0.83, with the largest gains on organizational folders defined by metadata such as venue or year, where single-shot methods collapses (Recall@1 0.09 to 0.50). On the public LaMP-2 benchmark, the same approach improves accuracy from 44.5% to 51.5% (+9.0 macro-F1) over a single-shot baseline, while remaining low-cost for practical use.
tldr: 论文提出PaperRouter-Agent，一个无需训练的LLM代理，通过利用文件夹内论文内容而非仅名称，实现个性化层次化论文路由，在真实个人库和公共基准上显著提升路由准确率。
abstract_cn: 研究人员将其收集的论文在文献管理工具中组织成个人文件夹层级结构，并将每篇新论文归入其所属文件夹。该任务不同于标准的分层文本分类。用户的文件夹层级并非固定共享的分类体系，而是一种私有的、不断演化的分众分类法（folksonomy），其文件夹含义可能涉及主题、简写、来源或流程导向，且通常由已存储其中的论文所定义。我们将这一场景形式化为个性化分层论文路由（personalized hierarchical paper routing, PHPR）：在无需针对每个用户进行训练的情况下，将新论文分配到用户特定层级中的文件夹。我们提出PaperRouter-Agent，一种无需训练的大语言模型（LLM）智能体，其路由决策不仅基于文件夹名称，更以文件夹成员为依据。该智能体首先缩小候选层级范围，检索文件夹特定证据，通过检查成员论文来验证匹配度，并整合来自用户过去拒绝记录的相似度门控反馈。一项基于真实个人文献库的形成性研究表明，PaperRouter-Agent将整体Recall@1从0.39提升至0.61，Recall@3从0.57提升至0.83，其中在由来源或年份等元数据定义的组织性文件夹上提升最为显著——单次方法在此类文件夹上的Recall@1从0.09降至0.50。在公开的LaMP-2基准测试中，相较于单次基线方法，相同方法将准确率从44.5%提升至51.5%（宏F1值提升9.0），同时保持实际应用中的低成本。

analysis.chinese_title: PaperRouter-Agent：一种基于内容的LLM智能体，用于个性化分层论文路由
analysis.summary: 本文提出个性化分层论文路由（PHPR）任务，即根据用户个人文件夹层次结构将新论文分配到正确文件夹。与标准分层文本分类不同，用户文件夹是私有的、演化的民间分类法，其含义由内部论文定义。作者提出PaperRouter-Agent，一种无需训练的LLM智能体，通过四阶段流程（规划器、检索器、检查器、反射器）实现路由：规划器缩小候选范围，检索器按类型获取证据，检查器阅读成员论文判断匹配，反射器利用用户反馈改进。在真实个人图书馆研究中，Recall@1从0.39提升至0.61，Recall@3从0.57提升至0.83；在LaMP-2基准上，准确率从44.5%提升至51.5%。
innovations: 形式化个性化分层论文路由（PHPR）任务，区分于标准分层文本分类
提出四阶段LLM智能体框架（规划器、检索器、检查器、反射器），无需训练
基于文件夹内容而非名称进行路由决策，处理语义模糊、缩写、元数据等文件夹类型
引入反馈记忆机制，利用用户接受/拒绝信号在线改进
在真实用户图书馆和公共基准上取得显著提升
analysis.methodology: 采用四阶段LLM智能体：规划器通过自上而下遍历缩小候选文件夹；检索器按文件夹类型（主题/元数据）选择证据；检查器阅读成员论文判断匹配，支持弃权；反射器存储用户反馈并注入相关拒绝案例。使用gpt-4o-mini作为骨干模型，在真实Zotero图书馆和LaMP-2基准上评估。
analysis.key_results: 在5位研究人员的真实Zotero图书馆上，Recall@1从0.39提升至0.61，Recall@3从0.57提升至0.83；在LaMP-2基准上，准确率从44.5%提升至51.5%，宏F1提升9.0点。
strengths: 无需训练，直接使用预训练LLM
处理多种文件夹类型（主题、缩写、元数据、状态）
通过内容阅读和反馈记忆实现个性化
在真实用户场景和公共基准上均有效
limitations: 反射器效果仅在单次研究中体现，未进行纵向评估
缺乏大规模公共基准
处理状态文件夹（如“待读”）仍为困难情况
成本与延迟高于单次调用方法
analysis.relevance_to_keywords: 论文直接涉及个性化文本分类、检索增强生成、LLM智能体和个人知识管理，与关键词高度相关。

reasons: 接近喜欢过的《MLLMRec: A Preference Reasoning Paradigm w》
偏好主题：user、recall

title: FAIR GraphRAG: A Retrieval-Augmented Generation Approach for Semantic Data Analysis
abstract: Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) addresses the limitations of Large Language Models (LLMs) when providing responses to domain-specific questions. Graph-based RAG approaches, such as GraphRAG, enhance retrieval by capturing semantic relationships within knowledge graphs (KGs). While the FAIR principles (Findability, Accessibility, Interoperability, and Reusability) are becoming prevalent for scientific data management, especially in complex domains such as medicine, existing RAG approaches lack a structured FAIRification of the underlying knowledge resources. This lack limits their potential for FAIR information retrieval in these domains. To address this gap, we introduce FAIR GraphRAG, a novel framework that integrates FAIR Digital Objects (FDOs) as the fundamental units of a graph-based retrieval system. Each graph node represents an FDO that incorporates core data, metadata, persistent identifiers, and semantic links. We leverage LLMs to support schema construction and automated extraction of content and metadata from data sources. The framework was co-designed by physicians and computer scientists to ensure technical and clinical relevance. We apply FAIR GraphRAG to a biomedical dataset in gastroenterology, demonstrating its applicability to RNA-sequencing data. Beyond ensuring adherence to the FAIR principles, FAIR GraphRAG significantly improves question answering accuracy, coverage, and explainability, particularly for complex queries involving metadata and ontology links. This work shows the feasibility of combining FAIR data practices with graph-based retrieval techniques. We see potential for applying our approach to other specialized fields such as education and business.
tldr: 该论文提出FAIR GraphRAG框架，将FAIR数字对象集成到图检索增强生成中，以提升生物医学数据问答的准确性、覆盖率和可解释性。
abstract_cn: 检索增强生成（Retrieval-Augmented Generation, RAG）解决了大型语言模型（Large Language Models, LLMs）在回答特定领域问题时存在的局限性。基于图的RAG方法（如GraphRAG）通过捕获知识图谱（Knowledge Graphs, KGs）中的语义关系来增强检索能力。尽管FAIR原则（可发现性、可访问性、互操作性和可重用性）在科学数据管理（尤其是医学等复杂领域）中日益普及，但现有的RAG方法缺乏对底层知识资源的结构化FAIR化处理。这一不足限制了它们在这些领域实现FAIR信息检索的潜力。为弥补这一空白，我们提出了FAIR GraphRAG——一种将FAIR数字对象（FAIR Digital Objects, FDOs）作为基于图的检索系统基本单元的新型框架。每个图节点代表一个FDO，其中包含核心数据、元数据、持久标识符和语义链接。我们利用LLMs支持模式构建以及从数据源中自动提取内容和元数据。该框架由医生和计算机科学家共同设计，以确保其技术相关性和临床相关性。我们将FAIR GraphRAG应用于胃肠病学生物医学数据集，展示了其在RNA测序数据上的适用性。除了确保遵循FAIR原则外，FAIR GraphRAG还显著提升了问答的准确性、覆盖率和可解释性，尤其适用于涉及元数据和本体链接的复杂查询。本研究表明，将FAIR数据实践与基于图的检索技术相结合是可行的。我们预计该方法可推广至教育、商业等其他专业领域。

reasons: 接近喜欢过的《MLLMRec: A Preference Reasoning Paradigm w》
偏好主题：techniques、language

title: Beyond Semantic IDs: Encoding Business-Value Ranking into Document Identifiers for Generative Retrieval
abstract: Generative Retrieval (GR) formulates retrieval as a sequence-to-sequence generation task, assigning each document a document identifier (DocID) and retrieving it through autoregressive decoding, making DocID design a critical factor in retrieval quality. However, existing schemes based on discrete representation learning suffer from inherent collision issues and create a mismatch between the DocID's encoding objective and the system's business optimization target. To address these limitations, we propose Cluster-Ranked Identifier (CRID), which decouples DocID into semantic clustering and business-value ranking, yielding collision-free identifiers that support incremental updates via intra-cluster reranking. We further introduce an analytical framework that decomposes retrieval gains into personalized preference and statistical prior generalization, revealing how semantic cluster size governs the balance between the two components. Experiments on a 300M-item Taobao e-commerce corpus show that CRID surpasses the strongest embedding-based retrieval baseline on top-K Hitrate, and delivers +1.06% GMV in full-traffic deployment.
tldr: 提出Cluster-Ranked Identifier (CRID)方法，通过将文档标识符解耦为语义聚类和业务价值排序，解决生成式检索中的标识符冲突和优化目标不匹配问题，在淘宝300M商品数据集上提升检索效果和GMV。
abstract_cn: 生成式检索（Generative Retrieval, GR）将检索任务构建为序列到序列的生成任务，为每个文档分配一个文档标识符（DocID），并通过自回归解码实现检索，这使得DocID的设计成为影响检索质量的关键因素。然而，现有基于离散表示学习的方案存在固有的冲突问题，并导致DocID的编码目标与系统的业务优化目标之间产生不匹配。为解决这些局限，我们提出聚类排序标识符（Cluster-Ranked Identifier, CRID），将DocID解耦为语义聚类与业务价值排序，从而生成无冲突的标识符，并支持通过簇内重排序实现增量更新。我们进一步引入一个分析框架，将检索增益分解为个性化偏好与统计先验泛化，揭示语义聚类规模如何调控两者间的平衡。在包含3亿商品的淘宝电商语料库上的实验表明，CRID在top-K命中率上超越了最强的基于嵌入的检索基线，并在全流量部署中实现了+1.06%的GMV增长。

analysis.chinese_title: 超越语义ID：将业务价值排序编码到文档标识符中用于生成式检索
analysis.summary: 生成式检索（GR）将检索建模为序列到序列生成任务，为每个文档分配文档标识符（DocID），并通过自回归解码进行检索。然而，现有基于离散表示学习的方案存在固有的冲突问题，并导致DocID的编码目标与系统的业务优化目标不匹配。为了解决这些限制，本文提出Cluster-Ranked Identifier (CRID)，将DocID解耦为语义聚类和业务价值排序，生成无冲突的标识符，并支持通过簇内重排序进行增量更新。本文进一步引入分析框架，将检索增益分解为个性化偏好和统计先验泛化，揭示语义簇大小如何控制两者之间的平衡。在包含3亿商品的淘宝电商语料上的实验表明，CRID在top-K命中率上超越了最强的基于嵌入的检索基线，并在全流量部署中带来了+1.06%的GMV提升。
innovations: 首次将业务价值作为序数排序编码到DocID的最后一个码本层级中，实现无冲突标识符和增量更新。
提出将检索增益分解为个性化偏好和统计先验泛化的分析框架，揭示语义簇大小如何控制两者平衡。
在3亿商品规模的淘宝电商语料上，CRID在top-K命中率上超越最强嵌入检索基线，并带来显著业务提升。
analysis.methodology: 使用对比学习在查询-商品对上训练商品嵌入，通过RQ-KMeans进行语义聚类，然后在每个语义簇内根据业务价值（如转化率）对商品进行排序，将排序作为DocID的最后一个层级。GR模型使用Qwen2.5-0.5B作为骨干，通过两阶段训练（DocID记忆和SFT）以及DPO优化。推理时使用带约束的束搜索。
analysis.key_results: CRID在in-search和out-of-search转化命中率上均优于所有基线，包括最强EBR系统。在in-search转化上，HR@20提升3.72个百分点，HR@1000提升9.10个百分点。在线A/B测试显示IPV提升0.18%，订单数提升0.54%，GMV提升1.06%。
strengths: 方法简单有效，仅改变最后一个码本层级即带来显著提升。
提供深入的分析框架，解释业务价值排序的有效性。
支持增量更新，无需重新训练码本。
在工业级大规模数据集上验证，并取得线上业务提升。
limitations: 实验仅在淘宝电商搜索场景进行，其他领域（如推荐）的有效性待验证。
业务价值排序依赖历史统计，存在冷启动偏差。
使用单一业务价值信号，多信号融合是开放方向。
所有实验使用0.5B参数模型，更大模型可能改变容量-语料平衡。
analysis.relevance_to_keywords: 论文与生成式推荐、LLM与推荐系统结合、工业落地高度相关。CRID是生成式检索中的DocID设计方法，直接应用于电商搜索推荐场景，并在淘宝全流量部署。论文还涉及序列推荐（用户历史行为）和排序（业务价值排序）。

reasons: 接近喜欢过的《MLLMRec: A Preference Reasoning Paradigm w》
偏好主题：zheng、preference、however

title: Boolean queries are all you need?
abstract: We equipped an LLM-based search agent with access to a Boolean retrieval engine to search the MS MARCO V2.1 deduped segment collection used by the TREC 2024 RAG track. Over a standard track subset of 86 topics, and operating under a budget of 100 model calls/topic, the agent achieved an NDCG@10 of 0.6863, which would place it above many dense, sparse, and learned-sparse first-stage retrievers. Ranking is based solely on the density of corpus substrings matching a query, with no requirement for supervised learning, global statistics, or term weights. Formally, the query language expresses a strict subset of the regular languages, with a document's score based on the number and length of matches it contains. Although the results are more exploratory than definitive, because they are based on a single test collection that was publicly available during model training, they suggest that simple pattern matching may be sufficient for agentic search.
tldr: 该论文探讨了使用布尔查询的LLM搜索代理在TREC RAG任务中的表现，发现简单模式匹配足以实现有效的检索，但未涉及推荐系统。
abstract_cn: 我们为基于LLM的搜索智能体配备了布尔检索引擎的访问权限，用于检索TREC 2024 RAG赛道所使用的MS MARCO V2.1去重段落集合。在标准赛道子集的86个主题上，以每个主题100次模型调用的预算运行，该智能体取得了0.6863的NDCG@10分数，这一成绩优于许多稠密型、稀疏型及学习型稀疏（learned-sparse）的第一阶段检索器。其排序完全依据语料库子串与查询匹配的密度，无需监督学习、全局统计或词项权重。形式上，该查询语言表达了正则语言的一个严格子集，文档得分基于其所包含的匹配项数量与长度。尽管这些结果更多是探索性而非结论性的——因为它们仅基于模型训练期间公开可用的单一测试集合——但它们表明，简单的模式匹配可能足以支持智能体搜索。

reasons: 接近喜欢过的《MLLMRec: A Preference Reasoning Paradigm w》
偏好主题：language

title: User Preference Induction with LLMs for Offline Top-N Recommendation Evaluation
abstract: Offline evaluation is the standard methodology for comparing top-N recommender systems, yet it relies on incomplete relevance information. In most benchmark datasets, only a small subset of user--item preferences is observed, and unjudged items are commonly treated as non-relevant. This missing-as-negative assumption can bias evaluation, penalize plausible recommendations with no recorded feedback, and favour algorithms that concentrate on popular or highly exposed items. We propose an LLM-based framework to expand relevance judgements for offline recommender evaluation. Our approach uses large language models in two complementary roles. First, a preference induction stage summarizes each user's historical interactions into a textual profile that captures their tastes and interests. Second, conditioned on this profile, an LLM acts as a relevance judge for candidate recommended items that lack observed labels in the original test data. To make this process tractable and evaluation-focused, we apply judgement expansion to a pooled candidate set built from the top-ranked outputs of multiple recommenders. The resulting enriched judgements provide additional relevance evidence for previously unobserved user--item pairs, enabling ranking metrics to be computed on a more complete basis. Experimental results show that this approach is a promising strategy for improving the robustness of offline top-N evaluation and mitigating the popularity-sensitive distortions caused by sparse feedback.
tldr: 该论文提出基于LLM的框架，通过用户偏好归纳和相关性判断扩展离线推荐评估中的标注数据，以缓解稀疏反馈导致的评估偏差。
abstract_cn: 离线评估是用于比较Top-N推荐系统的标准方法，但其依赖于不完整的相关性信息。在大多数基准数据集中，仅能观察到用户-物品偏好的一个小子集，而未经过评分的物品通常被视为不相关。这种“缺失即负样本”的假设可能导致评估偏差，惩罚那些没有记录反馈但看似合理的推荐，并偏向于聚焦热门或高曝光物品的算法。我们提出了一种基于大语言模型（LLM）的框架，用于扩展离线推荐评估中的相关性判断。该方法以大语言模型承担两个互补角色：首先，在偏好归纳阶段，将每位用户的历史交互总结为文本画像，以捕捉其品味与兴趣；其次，基于该画像，大语言模型充当相关性判断者，对原始测试数据中缺乏已观测标签的候选推荐物品进行评估。为使该过程易于处理且聚焦于评估，我们将判断扩展应用于由多个推荐器排名靠前的输出所构成的候选池集合。由此产生的增强判断为先前未观测到的用户-物品对提供了额外的相关性证据，使得排名指标能够在更完整的基础上进行计算。实验结果表明，该方法是一种有前景的策略，能够提升离线Top-N评估的鲁棒性，并缓解由稀疏反馈导致的流行度敏感偏差。

analysis.chinese_title: 利用大语言模型进行用户偏好归纳以实现离线Top-N推荐评估
analysis.summary: 离线评估是推荐系统比较的标准方法，但依赖不完整的相关性信息。大多数基准数据集中，只有少量用户-物品偏好被观测到，未评分的物品通常被视为不相关，这种“缺失即负”的假设会引入偏差，惩罚未记录反馈的合理推荐，并偏向推荐流行或高曝光物品的算法。本文提出基于LLM的框架来扩展离线推荐评估的相关性判断。该框架利用大语言模型扮演两个角色：首先，偏好归纳阶段将用户历史交互总结为文本画像；其次，基于该画像，LLM作为相关性判断器评估候选推荐物品中缺乏观测标签的项。通过将判断扩展应用于多个推荐器top输出构成的池化候选集，该方法为先前未观测的用户-物品对提供额外相关性证据，使排序指标能在更完整的基础上计算。实验表明，该方法能有效提升离线评估的鲁棒性，缓解稀疏反馈导致的流行度敏感偏差。
innovations: 将离线Top-N推荐评估问题形式化为不完整的个性化相关性判断问题，并指出缺失即负假设导致的流行度偏差。
提出两阶段LLM框架：第一阶段通过用户历史交互生成文本偏好画像（IPP），第二阶段基于该画像对池化候选集中的未标记物品进行个性化相关性判断。
将LLM判断与信息检索中的池化策略结合，仅对多个推荐器top输出构成的池化候选集进行判断，使评估扩展在计算上可行且聚焦于关键比较。
通过实验验证LLM生成的判断在系统级排序上与人类判断高度一致，并能有效降低评估与流行度之间的相关性，从而减轻流行度偏差。
analysis.methodology: 论文采用两阶段LLM框架。第一阶段（偏好归纳）：对每个用户，利用LLM根据其历史交互（评分及物品元数据）生成包含偏好叙述和判断指令的文本画像（IPP）。第二阶段（相关性判断）：基于IPP，LLM对池化候选集中的未标记用户-物品对输出离散相关性分数。池化候选集由多个推荐算法（包括随机、流行度、SLIM、SVD、BPRMF、WRMF、PLSA、NNCosNgbr、LDA、LRec、WSR、Prefs2vec、EASE、KLD、CHI2、RSV、LM-WSR等）的top-100输出构成。实验在MovieLens 32M和Goodbooks-10k数据集上进行，使用500用户子样本（通过分层抽样验证保持全用户排序一致性），评估指标为AP@100和NDCG@100，通过Kendall τ相关系数衡量排序一致性，并通过Δτ（与ARP的相关性变化）衡量流行度偏差缓解。
key_results: 在MovieLens 32M上，LLM判断与人类标签的系统级排序一致性很高：IPP+Profile策略下AP@100的Kendall τ达0.9594，NDCG@100达1.0000。
在池化补全实验中，LLM判断引入后系统排序与人类参考排序的Kendall τ在0.77-0.82之间，表明排序发生适度变化。
在流行度偏差缓解方面，IPP+Profile策略在合成池和增强池下均使Δτ达到-0.2095（AP）和-0.2000（NDCG），显著降低评估与流行度的耦合。
在Goodbooks-10k（头部分布数据集）上，LLM补全反而增加了流行度耦合（Δτ为正），表明方法效果依赖于未标记池的流行度结构。
tech_stack: 推荐算法: Random, Popularity, SLIM, SVD, PureSVD, BPRMF, WRMF, PLSA, NNCosNgbr-UB, NNCosNgbr-IB, LDA, LRec, WSR-IB, WSR-UB, Prefs2vec, EASE, KLD, CHI2, RSV, LM-WSR-UB, LM-WSR-IB
流行度度量: ARP (Average Recommendation Popularity)
strengths: 问题定义清晰，系统性地分析了离线评估中缺失即负假设导致的流行度偏差。
方法设计巧妙，将LLM与池化策略结合，既利用了LLM的个性化判断能力，又通过池化控制计算成本。
实验设计全面，包含判断准确性验证、排序稳定性分析、流行度偏差缓解测量以及边界条件测试。
结果具有实际意义，表明LLM判断能有效降低评估与流行度的耦合，且效果依赖于数据集的流行度结构。
limitations: LLM判断的标签级准确性有限（MAE在0.62-1.31之间），可能引入噪声。
实验仅使用单一LLM模型（Llama-4-Scout），未比较不同LLM的影响。
用户子样本仅500人，虽然验证了排序一致性，但可能无法完全代表全用户集。
方法在头部分布数据集（Goodbooks-10k）上未能缓解流行度偏差，表明适用场景有限。
未与人类评估者进行直接比较，仅以人类标签为基准，未考虑人类判断本身的不一致性。
relevance_to_keywords: LLM与推荐系统结合: 核心主题，使用LLM进行偏好归纳和相关性判断。
用户建模: 通过IPP生成用户偏好画像，实现个性化判断。
排序与重排: 评估Top-N推荐排序质量，关注排序指标和流行度偏差。
推荐系统的鲁棒性: 旨在提升离线评估的鲁棒性，减少稀疏反馈导致的偏差。
工业落地: 池化策略使方法在计算上可行，具有实际应用潜力。

reasons: 接近喜欢过的《MLLMRec: A Preference Reasoning Paradigm w》
偏好主题：language、preference、user

title: Characterising AI Models for Cataloguing
abstract: The creation of digital collections involves not only the digitisation of content, but also the creation of catalogue records for it. This often-overlooked task requires slow and costly expert manual work. In this project, we have evaluated the application of AI models to this task, comparing different implementations and models. This work includes a qualitative and quantitative evaluation of the experiments carried out, as well as recommendations on the use of AI models that go beyond the specific use case.
tldr: 该论文评估了AI模型在数字馆藏编目任务中的应用，通过定性和定量实验比较不同模型，并给出超越具体用例的AI使用建议。
abstract_cn: 数字馆藏的创建不仅涉及内容的数字化，还需为其编制目录记录。这一常被忽视的任务需要耗费大量时间与成本，依赖专家人工完成。在本项目中，我们评估了人工智能模型在此任务中的应用，比较了不同的实现方式与模型。本研究包括对所开展实验的定性与定量评估，并就超越特定用例的人工智能模型使用提出建议。

reasons: 接近喜欢过的《Enhancing Sequential Recommender with Larg》

title: Enhancing LLMs through human feedback: a journey towards self-improvement
abstract: In the rapidly evolving landscape of information retrieval systems, the ability to adapt and improve through user feedback is paramount. This study introduces a novel methodology for refining the performance of a primary Retrieval Augmented Generation (RAG) system by strategically integrating an auxiliary feedback RAG system. By systematically harnessing human-generated feedback, the approach aims to enhance the accuracy, relevance, and overall quality of responses, driving the system towards self-improvement. Central to this methodology is a human-in-the-loop implementation, where user feedback is continuously collected, classified, and integrated into the inference workflow, enabling the system to learn and evolve iteratively. To validate the effectiveness of this approach, the study employs rigorous testing against three diverse benchmark datasets focused on general and custom domain knowledge, utilizing a LLM-as-a-Judge evaluation strategy. This comprehensive framework not only underscores the transformative potential of feedback-driven enhancements in RAG systems but also sets a precedent for future research in adaptive information retrieval technologies, marking a significant step in the journey towards autonomous refinement and optimization through user engagement.
tldr: 该论文提出一种通过辅助反馈RAG系统整合人类反馈来提升主RAG系统性能的方法，实验表明该方法能有效提高准确性和相关性。
abstract_cn: 在信息检索系统快速演进的背景下，通过用户反馈实现系统自适应与改进的能力至关重要。本研究提出了一种新颖方法，通过策略性地集成一个辅助性反馈增强检索生成（Retrieval Augmented Generation, RAG）系统，来优化主RAG系统的性能。该方法系统性地利用人类生成的反馈，旨在提升响应的准确性、相关性及整体质量，推动系统实现自我改进。该方法的核心理念是采用人在回路（human-in-the-loop）机制，即持续收集、分类用户反馈并将其整合至推理工作流中，使系统能够迭代学习与进化。为验证该方法的有效性，本研究采用大语言模型作为裁判（LLM-as-a-Judge）的评估策略，针对三个涵盖通用与定制领域知识的多样化基准数据集进行了严格测试。这一综合框架不仅凸显了反馈驱动型增强在RAG系统中的变革潜力，也为自适应信息检索技术的未来研究树立了先例，标志着通过用户参与实现自主优化与改进的征程迈出了重要一步。

reasons: 接近喜欢过的《MLLMRec: A Preference Reasoning Paradigm w》
偏好主题：systems、user

title: Prompt Generation Technical Report
abstract: Generative retrieval has become an increasingly adopted paradigm for industrial search, recommendation, and advertising systems, delivering significant online gains. Most existing work combines user behavior sequences with large language models (LLMs) to model user preferences. In practice, feature engineering remains critical to model effectiveness, yet its complexity slows offline iteration and makes online deployment heavy and hard to reuse, all under tight online latency budgets. The root cause is a tight coupling between feature-processing logic and model architecture, where every feature change touches the training and serving code and resists reuse across scenarios. To break this coupling, we present Prompt Generation (PG), a high-level tokenizer and configuration-driven framework that decouples feature-processing logic from model architecture through two declarative JSON files, which serve as the single source of truth for both offline training and online serving, ensuring feature consistency across the two stages. Organizing features under four types with three composable processing components to assemble and compress heterogeneous features, PG delivers acceleration at three levels: (1)fast training iteration: feature experiments require only configuration changes, with built-in token compression for ultra-long sequences; (2)fast deployment: a new scenario only needs to conform to the PG schema and plug into a universal pipeline, with no scenario-specific engineering; (3)fast online inference: engine applies unified optimizations over the standardized configuration, reducing PG's overhead to a negligible level. PG has been deployed on Taobao Search with statistically significant online A/B uplifts of +0.47% in transaction count and +0.51% in GMV, and has been applied across multiple Taobao search and recommendation teams as the iteration framework for generative retrieval.
tldr: 该论文提出Prompt Generation框架，通过声明式配置解耦特征处理与模型架构，加速生成式检索在工业推荐系统中的迭代、部署和推理，并在淘宝搜索中取得显著线上收益。
abstract_cn: 生成式检索已成为工业搜索、推荐和广告系统中日益普及的范式，带来了显著的线上收益。现有工作大多将用户行为序列与大语言模型（LLMs）结合，以建模用户偏好。在实践中，特征工程对模型效果仍至关重要，但其复杂性拖慢了离线迭代速度，并导致线上部署臃肿且难以复用，这一切都受限于严格的线上延迟预算。其根本原因在于特征处理逻辑与模型架构之间的紧耦合：每次特征变更都会涉及训练和推理代码的修改，且难以跨场景复用。为打破这种耦合，我们提出了提示生成（Prompt Generation, PG），一种基于高层分词器与配置驱动的框架，通过两个声明式JSON文件将特征处理逻辑与模型架构解耦，这两个文件作为离线训练和线上服务的单一事实来源，确保两阶段的特征一致性。PG将特征组织为四种类型，并利用三个可组合的处理组件来组装和压缩异构特征，在三个层面实现加速：（1）快速训练迭代：特征实验仅需修改配置，内置分词压缩机制支持超长序列；（2）快速部署：新场景只需遵循PG模式并接入通用流水线，无需场景特定的工程开发；（3）快速在线推理：引擎基于标准化配置应用统一优化，将PG的开销降至可忽略水平。PG已在淘宝搜索中部署，取得了统计显著的线上A/B提升：交易笔数+0.47%，GMV+0.51%，并已作为生成式检索的迭代框架在淘宝多个搜索与推荐团队中推广应用。

analysis.chinese_title: 提示生成技术报告
analysis.summary: 本文提出Prompt Generation (PG)框架，通过声明式JSON配置解耦特征处理逻辑与模型架构，支持文本、嵌入、组合和序列四种特征类型，并包含预处理器、投影器和合并器三种可组合组件。PG框架在淘宝搜索、淘宝推荐和三个开源基准上验证有效，仅通过配置调整即可提升离线检索质量。在淘宝搜索生产环境中，PG带来交易量+0.47%和GMV+0.51%的显著线上提升，并已作为生成式检索的迭代框架在多个团队应用。
innovations: 提出统一配置协议PG，通过JSON声明式管理异构特征，实现特征处理与模型架构解耦。
设计四种特征类型（文本、嵌入、组合、序列）和三种可组合组件（预处理器、投影器、合并器），支持灵活的特征变换与压缩。
构建端到端训练-服务架构，包含事件追踪机制，通过在线特征回放消除训练-服务偏差。
实现三级加速：快速训练迭代（仅改配置）、快速部署（通用管道）、快速在线推理（统一优化）。
analysis.methodology: 采用配置驱动的方法，通过两个JSON文件（prompt_feature.json和prompt_template.json）声明特征处理和提示结构。特征处理包括预处理器（映射、分桶）、投影器（MLP）和合并器（均值、求和、拼接-MLP）。离线训练使用HuggingFace Transformers包装器，在线推理采用双层架构（Prompt Service和Prompt Generator），并通过事件追踪机制记录在线特征用于离线回放。
key_results: 在淘宝搜索、淘宝推荐和三个开源基准上，仅通过配置调整即可提升离线检索质量。
在淘宝搜索生产环境中，交易量提升+0.47%，GMV提升+0.51%，统计显著。
PG框架已应用于多个淘宝搜索和推荐团队作为生成式检索的迭代框架。
strengths: 配置驱动设计大幅降低特征工程复杂度，加速实验迭代。
统一协议确保离线训练与在线服务特征一致性，消除训练-服务偏差。
支持多种特征类型和可组合组件，灵活性强。
在工业级场景（淘宝搜索）取得显著线上收益，验证实用性。
limitations: 输入内容未提供具体开源基准名称和数据集细节。
输入内容未提供与其他方法的详细对比实验。
框架依赖JSON配置，复杂特征处理可能仍需自定义组件。
输入内容未提供消融实验或组件贡献分析。
analysis.relevance_to_keywords: 论文与生成式推荐、LLM与推荐系统结合高度相关，提出PG框架用于生成式检索中的特征管理。同时涉及序列推荐（序列特征）、工业落地（淘宝搜索部署），与推荐系统迭代效率相关。

title: NGM-RAG: Neural Graph Matching based Retrieval-Augmented Generation
abstract: Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) significantly enhances the ability of Large Language Models (LLMs) to provide accurate and contextually relevant answers by dynamically integrating external databases. However, traditional RAG methods are primarily constrained by their reliance on text-based retrieval strategies, which often struggle with complex questions requiring multi-hop reasoning. To address this limitation, we introduce Neural Graph Matching based Retrieval-Augmented Generation (NGM-RAG), a novel framework that leverages graph structures to effectively capture and utilize relational knowledge for improved retrieval and answer generation. NGM-RAG explicitly incorporates graph construction, graph matching, and answer generation into a unified process. Within this framework, we propose a neural graph matching approach that combines text-based matching with Graph Neural Networks (GNNs). By employing an adaptive weighting strategy, NGM-RAG efficiently integrates multiple matching methods to select the most relevant contextual node information for answer generation. Experimental results on multi-hop question answering and long-context summarization tasks demonstrate that our NGM-RAG model achieves superior performance compared to both traditional NaiveRAG methods and state-of-the-art graph-enhanced approaches such as GraphRAG and LightRAG.
tldr: 该论文提出NGM-RAG框架，利用图结构和图神经网络改进检索增强生成，在多跳问答和长文本摘要任务上优于传统方法。
abstract_cn: 检索增强生成（Retrieval-Augmented Generation, RAG）通过动态整合外部数据库，显著提升了大型语言模型（Large Language Models, LLMs）提供准确且上下文相关答案的能力。然而，传统RAG方法主要受限于其对基于文本的检索策略的依赖，这类策略在处理需要多跳推理的复杂问题时往往表现不佳。为解决这一局限，我们提出了基于神经图匹配的检索增强生成（Neural Graph Matching based Retrieval-Augmented Generation, NGM-RAG），这是一种新颖的框架，利用图结构有效捕获并利用关系知识，以改进检索与答案生成。NGM-RAG将图构建、图匹配与答案生成明确整合为一个统一流程。在该框架内，我们提出了一种神经图匹配方法，将基于文本的匹配与图神经网络（Graph Neural Networks, GNNs）相结合。通过采用自适应加权策略，NGM-RAG高效整合多种匹配方法，以选取最相关的上下文节点信息用于答案生成。在多跳问答与长文本摘要任务上的实验结果表明，我们的NGM-RAG模型相较于传统NaiveRAG方法以及GraphRAG、LightRAG等最先进的图增强方法，均取得了更优的性能。

reasons: 接近喜欢过的《MLLMRec: A Preference Reasoning Paradigm w》
偏好主题：capture、language、zheng

title: Generative Chinese Statute Retrieval
abstract: Statute retrieval is a fundamental task in legal information retrieval, yet existing approaches struggle to bridge the gap between colloquial legal queries and formal statutory language. In this paper, we propose GCSR, a generative statute retrieval framework that reformulates statute retrieval as a sequence generation problem and internalizes statutory knowledge into a generative model. Specifically, we propose a multi-granularity structured docid that encodes legal hierarchy and semantic information, together with a multi-task training strategy. Experiments show that GCSR consistently outperforms strong sparse, dense, and legal-domain baselines. Our results demonstrate the effectiveness of generative retrieval for statute retrieval and highlight its potential for broader legal information access and downstream legal reasoning tasks.
tldr: 论文提出GCSR框架，将法条检索建模为序列生成问题，通过多粒度结构化docid和多任务训练，在法条检索任务上优于传统方法。
abstract_cn: 法条检索是法律信息检索中的基础任务，然而现有方法难以弥合通俗法律查询与正式法条语言之间的鸿沟。本文提出GCSR，一种生成式法条检索框架，将法条检索重新定义为序列生成问题，并将法条知识内化至生成模型中。具体而言，我们提出一种多粒度结构化文档标识符（docid），用于编码法律层级结构与语义信息，并采用多任务训练策略。实验表明，GCSR在性能上持续优于强稀疏、稠密及法律领域基线模型。我们的结果证明了生成式检索在法条检索中的有效性，并凸显了其在更广泛的法律信息获取及下游法律推理任务中的应用潜力。

reasons: 接近喜欢过的《MLLMRec: A Preference Reasoning Paradigm w》
偏好主题：language、liu

title: Invariant Learning Dynamics of Transformers in Inductive Reasoning Tasks
abstract: We present a theoretical framework to explain the emergence of inductive reasoning abilities in Transformer language models. While previous works on Transformer learning dynamics have so far been mostly tied to specific tasks, we study a generalized class of inductive tasks that unifies several synthetic tasks known in the literature, including in-context n-grams and multi-hop reasoning. In this class, we theoretically prove that the training dynamics of attention models can be confined to a highly interpretable, low-dimensional invariant manifold. On this manifold, the learning dynamics are captured by a handful of interpretable coordinates rather than millions of parameters, making both theoretical and empirical analysis more tractable. Using this framework, we characterize how data statistics govern the competition between in-context and in-weights learning, we study how random initializations determine the `winning' circuit when multiple solutions are possible, and we demonstrate that the coordinate frame associated with the manifold can be used to automatically detect which circuits have been learned in trained models. By casting circuit formation as a low-dimensional dynamical phenomenon, we take a step toward a predictive theory of how Transformers learn.
tldr: 该论文提出了一个理论框架来解释Transformer语言模型在归纳推理任务中的学习动态，通过低维不变流形简化分析，揭示了数据统计和随机初始化对电路形成的影响。
abstract_cn: 我们提出一个理论框架，用以解释Transformer语言模型中归纳推理能力的涌现机制。尽管先前关于Transformer学习动力学的研究大多局限于特定任务，但本研究针对一类广义的归纳任务展开分析，这类任务统一了文献中已知的若干合成任务，包括上下文n元语法（in-context n-grams）与多跳推理（multi-hop reasoning）。在此类任务中，我们从理论上证明注意力模型的训练动力学可被限制在一个高度可解释的低维不变流形（invariant manifold）上。在该流形上，学习动力学由少数可解释坐标而非数百万参数所刻画，这使得理论与实证分析均更易处理。借助这一框架，我们描述了数据统计特征如何调控上下文学习（in-context learning）与权重内学习（in-weights learning）之间的竞争，研究了当存在多种可能解时随机初始化如何决定“胜出”电路，并论证了与该流形关联的坐标框架可用于自动检测已训练模型中哪些电路已被习得。通过将电路形成视为低维动力学现象，我们向构建Transformer学习机制的预测性理论迈出了一步。

reasons: 接近喜欢过的《Enhancing Sequential Recommender with Larg》
偏好主题：transformer、language

title: Requential Coding: Pushing the Limits of Model Compression with Self-Generated Training Data
abstract: Compression is fundamental to intelligence. A model that can represent its training data as a short code has discovered regularities that enable generalization. Large neural networks may learn functions far simpler than their parameter counts suggest, but it is challenging to construct codes that realize this simplicity. Parameter-based methods such as quantization produce code lengths that scale with model size, insensitive to how much information the parameters store. Prequential coding bypasses this issue by compressing the training trajectory, but codes the exact data sequence regardless of how much the model learns, yielding large codes when the data has high entropy. We introduce requential coding, where a teacher model selects training samples drawn from the student's own distribution. The student's code records only these selections, which cost bits only where teacher and student disagree. The resulting code length is independent of parameter count and data entropy, and often orders of magnitude shorter than the prequential counterpart, with an advantage that grows with scale. This compression sheds light on phenomena inaccessible to prior compressors. Holding loss fixed, larger models and ensembles compress to much smaller sizes despite more parameters. Plugged into a PAC-Bayes bound, the requential code yields state-of-the-art generalization guarantees for billion-parameter LLMs, outperforming bounds built on aggressive post-training quantization even granted zero error. The bound tightens with scale in the compute-optimal regime, as models become increasingly compressible relative to dataset size. The same code predicts that models gradually overfit when trained for multiple epochs. It also isolates the learnable information in a dataset from its unpredictable, random content, revealing that lower-entropy text holds far more learnable structure than higher-entropy image data.
tldr: 该论文提出requential coding方法，通过教师模型选择学生模型分布中的训练样本进行编码，实现与参数数量和数据熵无关的压缩，并在PAC-Bayes泛化界上取得领先结果。
abstract_cn: 压缩是智能的基础。一个能够将其训练数据表示为短编码的模型，已经发现了能够实现泛化的规律性。大型神经网络可能学习到远比其参数数量所暗示的更简单的函数，但构建实现这种简单性的编码却颇具挑战性。基于参数的方法（如量化）产生的编码长度随模型规模变化，而对参数存储的信息量不敏感。先验编码通过压缩训练轨迹绕过了这一问题，但无论模型学到多少，它都对精确的数据序列进行编码，当数据具有高熵时会产生较大的编码。我们引入了后验编码，其中教师模型选择从学生自身分布中抽取的训练样本。学生的编码仅记录这些选择，其比特成本仅出现在教师与学生意见不一致之处。由此产生的编码长度与参数数量和数据熵无关，且通常比先验编码短数个数量级，这种优势随规模扩大而增长。这种压缩揭示了先前压缩器无法触及的现象。在保持损失不变的情况下，更大的模型和集成尽管参数更多，却能压缩到更小的尺寸。将后验编码代入PAC-Bayes界，它为拥有十亿参数的大型语言模型提供了最先进的泛化保证，甚至优于基于激进的后训练量化（即使假设零误差）所构建的界。在计算最优的范围内，该界随规模扩大而收紧，因为模型相对于数据集规模变得越来越可压缩。相同的编码预测，当模型在多个周期上训练时会逐渐过拟合。它还将数据集中的可学习信息与其不可预测的随机内容分离开来，揭示了低熵文本比高熵图像数据拥有多得多的可学习结构。

title: A Minimalist Retargeting-Guided Reinforcement Learning Recipe for Dexterous Manipulation
abstract: Recent work in humanoid whole-body control has found success with a simple recipe: retarget human motion to robot kinematic references, then train policies via reinforcement learning (RL) to track them. But how does this recipe transfer to dexterous manipulation? The answer is not obvious, as manipulation involves complex, contact-rich dynamics and requires delicate regulation of contact modes and forces. We present REGRIND, a minimalist retargeting-guided RL pipeline that learns dexterous manipulation policies from a single human demonstration. REGRIND retargets human hand-object motion to a robot reference that preserves hand-object spatial and contact relationships, trains a residual RL policy in simulation to track object-centric keypoints along that reference, and transfers the resulting policy zero-shot to hardware with careful system identification. The resulting policies produce fluid, human-like behavior on two different multi-fingered hands across contact-rich tool-use tasks, including operating a pair of scissors and turning a screwdriver. Through systematic hardware experiments, we identify and analyze the key factors that govern sim-to-real transfer in dexterous manipulation, offering practical guidance for retargeting-based learning in contact-rich settings. Videos and code are available at https://yunhaifeng.com/REGRIND.
tldr: 该论文提出一种基于重定向引导的强化学习流水线REGRIND，从单个人类演示中学习灵巧操作策略，并在真实机器人上零样本迁移，实现剪刀和螺丝刀等工具操作。
abstract_cn: 近期关于仿人全身控制的研究已通过一种简洁方法取得成功：将人体运动重定向至机器人运动学参考轨迹，再通过强化学习训练策略以跟踪这些轨迹。然而，这种方法如何迁移至灵巧操作任务？答案并不明确，因为灵巧操作涉及复杂的接触密集动力学，且需要精细调节接触模式与接触力。我们提出REGRIND——一种极简的重定向引导强化学习管线，仅需单次人类演示即可学习灵巧操作策略。REGRIND将人类手部-物体运动重定向至保留手-物空间与接触关系的机器人参考轨迹，在仿真环境中训练残差强化学习策略以跟踪该参考轨迹中面向物体的关键点，并通过精细的系统辨识将所得策略零样本迁移至真实硬件。最终策略能在两种不同多指机械手上，针对接触密集的工具使用任务（包括操作剪刀与旋转螺丝刀）生成流畅且类人的行为。通过系统性硬件实验，我们识别并分析了主导灵巧操作中仿真到现实迁移的关键因素，为基于重定向的接触密集场景学习提供实践指导。视频与代码详见https://yunhaifeng.com/REGRIND。

reasons: 接近喜欢过的《MLLMRec: A Preference Reasoning Paradigm w》

title: A Durability and Cross-Language Transfer Benchmark for a Validated Teaching-Feedback Classification Protocol
abstract: Institutions collect far more open-ended teaching-evaluation feedback than they read. A prior study introduced a validated protocol for classifying such comments by thematic category and sentiment, built from a documented annotation guide, an intra-annotator reliability measurement, stratified cross-validation, and a held-out evaluation on a Spanish institutional corpus with a frozen-encoder design. Two questions limit its reuse: whether a protocol fixed to 2019-era frozen embeddings stays competitive as representation methods advance, and whether it transfers to a second language. We re-run it on the original Spanish data across three representation generations, sparse lexical features, frozen transformer embeddings, and prompted large language models, and transfer its sentiment task to English with a balanced 45,000-comment corpus checked against an aspect-labeled education dataset. Treating paired comparisons as descriptive, we find the protocol durable: a 2026 frontier model posts the highest thematic F1 on the hardest Spanish task, yet shows no sentiment advantage over a cheap model and no descriptive separation from it on English, so model choice is a deployment decision, not a property of the method.
tldr: 该论文评估了一个教学反馈分类协议在多年后的持久性以及从西班牙语到英语的跨语言迁移能力，发现协议具有持久性，但模型选择是部署决策而非方法属性。
abstract_cn: 机构收集的开放式教学评价反馈数量远超其实际阅读量。先前的一项研究引入了一种经过验证的分类协议，该协议基于有记录的注释指南、注释者间信度测量、分层交叉验证，并采用冻结编码器设计在西班牙语机构语料库上进行保留评估，从而按主题类别和情感对这些评论进行分类。有两个问题限制了该协议的复用：一是固定于2019年时代冻结嵌入的协议在表征方法不断进步时能否保持竞争力，二是该协议能否迁移至第二语言。我们在原始西班牙语数据上重新运行该协议，跨越三代表征方法——稀疏词汇特征、冻结Transformer嵌入以及提示式大型语言模型，并将其情感任务迁移至英语，使用一个包含45,000条评论的平衡语料库，该语料库已对照一个方面标注的教育数据集进行了校验。将配对比较视为描述性分析后，我们发现该协议具有持久性：2026年的前沿模型在难度最高的西班牙语任务上取得了最高的主题F1值，但在情感任务上相较于廉价模型并无优势，且在英语任务上与后者无描述性差异。因此，模型选择属于部署决策，而非方法本身的属性。

title: Inside the Unfair Judge: A Mechanistic Interpretability Account of LLM-as-Judge Bias
abstract: Existing studies of LLM-as-judge scoring bias work predominantly at the input-output level: they perturb inputs, measure score deltas, and propose prompt-level mitigations. We argue that the same biases admit a representation-level account in the judge's hidden state, complementary to the input-output view and operationally useful in ways it does not afford. We report three findings, across seven judges, seven bias types, and nine benchmarks. Geometry: baseline judging inputs occupy a tight activation manifold while biased inputs are displaced along a low-dimensional, type-specific subspace that sharpens with depth and is recovered consistently by three families of estimators. Causal control: steering hidden states along this subspace drives scoring in both directions, forward shifts reproducing biased scoring on clean inputs and reverse shifts restoring baseline scoring on biased ones, while matched-norm random directions produce shifts an order of magnitude smaller. Operational: a simple linear projection onto the same bias-direction features anticipates judge failures on three entirely unseen benchmarks, substantially outperforming text-based alternatives. Reading bias as activation geometry, rather than as input-output noise, unifies geometric structure, causal control, and operational prediction within a single framework. The project page is available at https://xzx34.github.io/unfair-judge/
tldr: 该论文通过机械可解释性方法揭示LLM作为评判者时的偏见在隐藏状态中的几何结构，并实现因果控制和偏见预测。
abstract_cn: 现有关于大语言模型作为裁判（LLM-as-judge）评分偏差的研究主要停留在输入-输出层面：通过扰动输入、测量分数变化并提出提示层面的缓解策略。我们认为，相同的偏差在裁判的隐藏状态中具有表征层面的解释，这与输入-输出视角互为补充，并在操作层面具有后者所不具备的实用性。我们报告了涵盖七种裁判模型、七种偏差类型及九个基准测试的三项发现。几何结构：基准评判输入占据一个紧凑的激活流形，而有偏输入则沿低维、类型特定的子空间发生位移，该子空间随网络深度增加而锐化，并被三类估计器一致地恢复。因果控制：沿该子空间操控隐藏状态可双向驱动评分，正向偏移在干净输入上复现有偏评分，反向偏移则在有偏输入上恢复基准评分，而匹配范数的随机方向产生的偏移幅度小一个数量级。操作性：将同一偏差方向特征进行简单线性投影，即可在三个完全未见过的基准测试上预测裁判的失败，其性能显著优于基于文本的替代方法。将偏差解读为激活几何结构而非输入-输出噪声，可在单一框架内统一几何结构、因果控制与操作性预测。项目页面见 https://xzx34.github.io/unfair-judge/

reasons: 接近喜欢过的《MLLMRec: A Preference Reasoning Paradigm w》

title: Input-Aware Dynamic Backdoor Attack Against Quantum Neural Networks
abstract: Quantum Neural Networks (QNNs) are a promising framework for quantum machine learning on near-term quantum devices, but their security risks remain insufficiently understood. Studies have shown that QNNs are vulnerable to backdoor attacks, yet existing quantum backdoors mostly rely on a fixed trigger shared by all poisoned inputs. This fixed-trigger design is a major weakness because many defenses detect or weaken the repeated patterns such triggers leave in data representations. Although input-aware dynamic backdoors have been studied in classical neural networks, transferring them to QNNs is difficult because quantum learning introduces new obstacles. In particular, measurement compresses the post-ansatz quantum state into a limited classical output, weakening supervision for a trigger generator, while individual density matrices fluctuate with the input and make per-sample contrastive learning unstable. To address these challenges, we propose Q-DIBA, the first input-aware dynamic backdoor attack for QNNs. Q-DIBA jointly trains a classical trigger generator and a victim QNN through a three-mode mini-batch strategy that supports clean behavior, attack activation, and trigger specificity. To provide stable quantum-level supervision, Q-DIBA introduces an ensemble density contrastive loss that operates on post-ansatz quantum states before measurement and contrasts mode-averaged density matrices rather than individual samples. Experiments on MNIST and Fashion-MNIST across multiple QNN architectures show that Q-DIBA achieves high clean accuracy, strong attack success, and high cross-trigger accuracy, demonstrating effectiveness, stealthiness, and input specificity. The attack also remains resilient against defenses including visual inspection, spectral-signature detection, and fine-tuning, suggesting that input-aware quantum backdoors are an important threat to secure QNN deployment.
tldr: 该论文提出了一种针对量子神经网络的输入感知动态后门攻击方法Q-DIBA，通过联合训练触发器生成器和受害者QNN，实现了高攻击成功率和隐蔽性。
abstract_cn: 量子神经网络（QNNs）是近期量子设备上量子机器学习的一种有前景的框架，但其安全风险尚未得到充分理解。研究表明，QNNs易受后门攻击，然而现有的量子后门大多依赖于所有中毒输入共享的固定触发器。这种固定触发器设计是一个主要弱点，因为许多防御方法能够检测或削弱此类触发器在数据表征中留下的重复模式。尽管输入感知的动态后门已在经典神经网络中得到研究，但将其迁移至QNNs存在困难，因为量子学习引入了新的障碍。具体而言，测量将后拟设（post-ansatz）量子态压缩为有限的经典输出，削弱了对触发器生成器的监督，而单个密度矩阵随输入波动，使得逐样本对比学习不稳定。为应对这些挑战，我们提出Q-DIBA，这是首个针对QNNs的输入感知动态后门攻击。Q-DIBA通过一种三模式小批量策略联合训练经典触发器生成器与受害QNN，该策略支持清洁行为、攻击激活及触发器特异性。为提供稳定的量子级监督，Q-DIBA引入了一种集成密度对比损失，该损失作用于测量前的后拟设量子态，并对比模式平均密度矩阵而非单个样本。在MNIST和Fashion-MNIST数据集上针对多种QNN架构的实验表明，Q-DIBA实现了高清洁准确率、强攻击成功率及高交叉触发器准确率，展现了有效性、隐蔽性和输入特异性。该攻击对包括视觉检查、谱特征检测和微调在内的防御方法仍具有鲁棒性，表明输入感知量子后门是安全部署QNN的重要威胁。

reasons: 个性化信号较弱，主要依据基础相关性

title: Transformer-Guided Swarm Intelligence for Frugal Neural Architecture Search
abstract: Neural Architecture Search (NAS) has automated the design of deep learning models but traditionally requires massive computational resources, often measured in thousands of GPU-days. In this paper, we propose a frugal and memetic NAS framework designed to democratize architecture design on consumer-grade hardware. Our approach combines the global macro-search capabilities of an autoregressive Transformer controller, trained via Reinforcement Learning (RL), with the local micro-exploitation of an Artificial Bee Colony (ABC) algorithm. To prevent premature convergence during the RL phase, we introduce a dynamic entropy mechanism that forces topological exploration upon detection of performance stagnation. Evaluated on a standard GPU (NVIDIA RTX 3060), our hybrid method effectively resolves the "cold-start" problem inherent in metaheuristics. By algorithmically penalizing network depth, our framework actively mitigates model bloat: on the CIFAR-10 dataset, it discovers an efficient architecture reaching 84.85% accuracy with only $\sim$174,000 parameters (significantly smaller than standard baselines like ResNet-20) in 3 hours of search time. Furthermore, we demonstrate the framework's flexibility by applying it to credit card fraud detection, directly optimizing the F1-Score on highly imbalanced tabular data to reach a F1-Score of 0.71 with a compact network of $\sim$4,600 parameters. These results suggest that our approach can yield tailored, accessible, and highly parameter-efficient deep learning models suitable for edge deployment.
tldr: 该论文提出一种节俭的神经架构搜索框架，结合Transformer和人工蜂群算法，在消费级硬件上高效发现参数精简的深度学习模型。
abstract_cn: 神经架构搜索（Neural Architecture Search, NAS）已实现深度学习模型的自动化设计，但传统方法通常需要大量计算资源（常以数千GPU天衡量）。本文提出一种节俭且基于模因的NAS框架，旨在使消费级硬件上的架构设计大众化。我们的方法将自回归Transformer控制器（通过强化学习（Reinforcement Learning, RL）训练）的全局宏观搜索能力，与人工蜂群（Artificial Bee Colony, ABC）算法的局部微观开发相结合。为防止RL阶段的过早收敛，我们引入动态熵机制，该机制在检测到性能停滞时强制进行拓扑探索。在标准GPU（NVIDIA RTX 3060）上的评估表明，我们的混合方法有效解决了元启发式算法固有的“冷启动”问题。通过算法层面惩罚网络深度，该框架主动缓解模型臃肿：在CIFAR-10数据集上，它仅需3小时搜索时间即可发现高效架构，以约174,000个参数达到84.85%的准确率（显著小于ResNet-20等标准基线）。此外，我们通过将该框架应用于信用卡欺诈检测，直接优化高度不平衡表格数据的F1分数，以约4,600个参数的紧凑网络达到0.71的F1分数，展示了框架的灵活性。这些结果表明，我们的方法能够生成定制化、易获取且高度参数高效的深度学习模型，适用于边缘部署。

reasons: 接近喜欢过的《Enhancing Sequential Recommender with Larg》
偏好主题：transformer

title: Relaxing Faithfulness with Intervention-Only Causal Discovery
abstract: Causal discovery algorithms learn a network that describes the causal dependencies among random variables. A common workflow involves first utilizing conditional independence properties on observational data to determine partially directed causal relationships, then applying interventions to orient the unknown causal directions. A critical assumption for the first step is faithfulness: a requirement that causally linked variables exhibit statistical dependence. Many natural systems include buffering and stabilizing pathways that cancel out to achieve systemic robustness. This cancellation of pathways violates faithfulness, leading causal discovery algorithms to incorrectly remove causal dependencies. In this paper, we argue that hard interventions contain information about the presence/absence of causal linkage that is overlooked in the first stage of structure discovery. We show that a mild assumption -- called intervention-immediacy faithfulness -- that allows cancellations, is sufficient to nonparametrically identify causal structures with hard interventions. These results position interventions as the primary carriers of information about causal structure, which should take precedence over conditional independence testing. To flip the paradigm, we also specify equivalence classes when the identification criteria are not met due to limitations in the scope of interventions.
tldr: 该论文提出在因果发现中放宽忠实性假设，仅利用干预信息来识别因果结构，证明了干预-即时忠实性足以非参数地识别因果图。
abstract_cn: 因果发现算法通过学习网络来描述随机变量之间的因果依赖关系。常见的工作流程首先利用观测数据中的条件独立性性质来确定部分有向的因果关系，然后通过施加干预来定向未知的因果方向。第一步的一个关键假设是忠实性（faithfulness）：要求因果关联的变量表现出统计依赖性。许多自然系统包含缓冲和稳定路径，这些路径相互抵消以实现系统鲁棒性。这种路径的抵消违反了忠实性，导致因果发现算法错误地移除因果依赖关系。在本文中，我们认为硬干预（hard intervention）包含关于因果关联存在与否的信息，而这些信息在结构发现的第一阶段被忽略了。我们证明了一个允许抵消的温和假设——称为干预即时忠实性（intervention-immediacy faithfulness）——足以通过硬干预非参数地识别因果结构。这些结果将干预定位为因果结构信息的主要载体，其优先级应高于条件独立性检验。为了翻转这一范式，我们还指定了当因干预范围限制而无法满足识别标准时的等价类（equivalence classes）。

title: From Expressivity to Sample Complexity: Narrow Teachers for Transformers via C-RASP
abstract: A theoretical understanding of Transformers is crucial to better understand the capacities and limitations of large language models (LLMs). There is much work analyzing the expressivity of attention-based models. By proposing handcrafted weights or using computational complexity arguments, a large amount of past theoretical works have sought to characterize which tasks are and which are not in the hypothesis class of Transformer models. However, little work investigates the learnability of such solutions. In this work, we make progress towards this goal. Inspired by recent loss landscape analysis work, we propose preliminary sample complexity bounds for learning C-RASP constructions with Transformers.
tldr: 该论文从理论角度分析Transformer的表达能力，并提出学习C-RASP构造的样本复杂度界限，与推荐系统无关。
abstract_cn: 对Transformer的理论理解对于深入把握大型语言模型（LLMs）的能力与局限性至关重要。目前已有大量工作分析了基于注意力机制模型的表达能力。通过设计人工权重或运用计算复杂性论证，过往诸多理论研究试图界定哪些任务属于Transformer模型的假设类，哪些则不属于。然而，鲜有研究探讨此类解的可学习性。本研究在此方向上取得了进展。受近期损失景观分析工作的启发，我们提出了利用Transformer学习C-RASP构造的初步样本复杂度边界。

reasons: 接近喜欢过的《Enhancing Sequential Recommender with Larg》
偏好主题：transformer、language、however

title: An Exact Instrument for State Usage in Selective State-Space Models, and the Input-Driven Migration It Reveals
abstract: Selective state-space models such as Mamba route information through a bank of first-order modes whose input coupling is set by a learned selection mechanism. We give an exact instrument for measuring how a trained model uses these modes. Because the state matrix is diagonal, each channel's output decomposes exactly into per-mode contributions, and a per-(layer, channel, window) Gram tensor yields the exact output error of dropping any subset of modes, offline, at any budget. Validated against the reference implementation to a relative error of $2.3\times10^{-7}$ on the Mamba-1 family where it is exact, the instrument predicts a layer's deployed pruning error to a median relative deviation of $5\times10^{-7}$ over $4{,}464$ configurations, its floor set by the reconstruction. Applying the instrument across the Mamba-1 family (130M--2.8B), the deployed 7B Falcon-Mamba, and Mamba-2, we find that trained models re-allocate their state space with the input: which modes carry the signal migrates across contexts, and at the most affected layers a per-input oracle roughly halves the output error of a fixed mode set. Frozen-signal counterfactuals attribute the migration primarily to the input-dependent write map $B_t$; the timestep usually identified with selectivity carries almost none of it. Input-scheduled mode pruning on this measurement outperforms static, Hankel-based, and layer-adaptive rankings at every scale from 130M to the deployed 7B Falcon-Mamba, and at half the state budget it matches the unpruned model. Because the scheduler reads each window's mode usage from a first pass, this demonstrates realizable headroom; we claim no deployed compute or memory saving.
tldr: 该论文提出了一种精确工具来测量选择性状态空间模型中状态模式的使用情况，并揭示了输入驱动的模式迁移现象，但研究内容与推荐系统无关。
abstract_cn: 诸如Mamba等选择性状态空间模型通过一组一阶模态（mode）来路由信息，其输入耦合由学习到的选择机制设定。我们提供了一种精确的测量工具，用于衡量训练后的模型如何使用这些模态。由于状态矩阵是对角矩阵，每个通道的输出可精确分解为各模态的贡献，而每个（层、通道、窗口）的Gram张量可在离线状态下、任意预算下，精确给出移除任意模态子集所产生的输出误差。该工具在Mamba-1系列上验证时，与参考实现相比的相对误差为$2.3\times10^{-7}$（在该系列上为精确值），并能在$4{,}464$种配置下，以中位相对偏差$5\times10^{-7}$预测某一层的部署剪枝误差，其下限由重构误差决定。将该工具应用于Mamba-1系列（130M–2.8B）、已部署的7B Falcon-Mamba以及Mamba-2，我们发现训练后的模型会根据输入重新分配其状态空间：承载信号的模态会随上下文迁移，而在受影响最严重的层中，针对每个输入的理想模态选择（oracle）可将固定模态集的输出误差大致减半。冻结信号的对照实验（counterfactual）表明，这种迁移主要归因于与输入相关的写入映射$B_t$；而通常被视为选择性关键的时间步长（timestep）几乎不承担这一作用。基于该测量结果的输入调度模态剪枝（input-scheduled mode pruning）在从130M到已部署的7B Falcon-Mamba的各个规模上，均优于静态排序、基于Hankel矩阵的排序以及层自适应排序，并且在状态预算减半时，其性能与未剪枝模型相当。由于调度器通过第一次前向传播读取每个窗口的模态使用情况，这表明了可实现的空间；我们并未声称在部署中节省了计算或内存。

title: From Global to Factor-Wise Expert Composition in Discrete Diffusion Models
abstract: Discrete diffusion models offer a powerful framework for solving complex reasoning tasks, particularly through compositional generation, which combines multiple pre-trained experts to generalize beyond their individual training data. Recent theoretical corrections introduce time-dependent mixing weights to better align composed diffusion dynamics with the intended target. However, these methods are fundamentally limited by working on a per-sample basis, treating each generated state monolithically and ignoring the potential spatial or functional specializations of different experts. In this work, we address this limitation by proposing FactorDiff - a factor-wise composition framework for diffusion models. We posit that samples can be further decomposed into smaller factors, and propose a sampling process that dynamically routes each factor to the most relevant expert. We instantiate this framework with spatial/pixel-level compositions and validate it on the ARC-AGI benchmark, demonstrating that simple factor-specific routing consistently outperforms complex global scalar weighting schemes on tasks that require logical consistency and spatial disentanglement.
tldr: 该论文提出FactorDiff，一种因子级组合框架，通过将样本分解为因子并动态路由到最相关的专家，在ARC-AGI基准上优于全局标量加权方案，但研究内容与推荐系统无关。
abstract_cn: 离散扩散模型为解决复杂推理任务提供了强大框架，尤其通过组合式生成——即结合多个预训练专家以泛化至其各自训练数据之外——实现这一目标。近期理论修正引入了时间依赖混合权重，以更好地使组合扩散动力学与预期目标对齐。然而，这些方法本质上受限于逐样本（per-sample）的工作方式，将每个生成状态视为整体进行处理，忽略了不同专家潜在的空间或功能特化。在本工作中，我们通过提出FactorDiff——一种面向扩散模型的因子级组合框架——来应对这一局限。我们假设样本可进一步分解为更小的因子，并提出一种采样过程，该过程将每个因子动态路由至最相关的专家。我们通过空间/像素级（spatial/pixel-level）组合实例化该框架，并在ARC-AGI基准上验证其有效性，结果表明：在需要逻辑一致性与空间解耦的任务中，简单的因子特异性路由始终优于复杂的全局标量加权方案。

title: Paradoxes of Game Theoretic Equilibria and Price of Anarchy
abstract:
For decades, static solution concepts (Nash, Correlated, and Coarse Correlated Equilibria) and the Price of Anarchy (PoA) have formed the bedrock of algorithmic game theory, with no-regret learning proving fast convergence to such game-theoretic equilibria. We show that reducing multi-agent learning to static equilibrium and black-box regret analysis obscures underlying dynamic disequilibrium and game theoretic bounds.
  First, interior Nash equilibria lack $C^1$ vector field information, meaning agents cannot distinguish aligned from strictly opposing incentives. Inheriting this geometry, the worst-case pure Nash equilibria dictating robust PoA bounds manifest as topologically unstable strict saddles, and in canonical congestion games, as global repellers supported on almost everywhere strictly dominated strategies. Anchoring efficiency guarantees to these unstable states causes algebraic sensitivity; we prove that accommodating all strictly positive affine costs renders the PoA unbounded. Furthermore, projecting learning trajectories onto the discrete simplex of correlated play systematically accommodates non-rationalizable behavior. Evaluating dynamics via Coarse Correlated Equilibria or proximal refinements fails to preclude strictly dominated strategies. Moreover, optimal $O(1/T)$ swap-regret minimization does not preclude macroscopic turbulence, manifesting as chaotic limit sets even in minimal games. Finally, we examine the non-atomic limit of congestion games. Though considered highly stable with tight sub-linear $Θ(p/\ln p)$ PoA bounds (where $p$ is the polynomial degree), we prove that under discrete-time learning, the unique equilibrium destabilizes into Li-Yorke chaos and global attractors whose time-averaged inefficiency degrades exponentially as $2^p$. These results necessitate re-evaluating worst-case equilibrium frameworks for dynamically grounded metrics.
tldr: 该论文揭示了将多智能体学习简化为静态均衡和遗憾分析会掩盖动态失衡和博弈论界限，并证明均衡的不稳定性导致效率保证的代数敏感性甚至无界。
abstract_cn:
几十年来，静态解概念（纳什均衡、相关均衡和粗相关均衡）以及无政府状态代价（Price of Anarchy, PoA）构成了算法博弈论的基石，无遗憾学习被证明能快速收敛到此类博弈均衡。我们证明，将多智能体学习简化为静态均衡与黑箱遗憾分析，会掩盖其背后的动态非均衡与博弈论界。

首先，内部纳什均衡缺乏 $C^1$ 向量场信息，这意味着智能体无法区分一致激励与严格对立激励。继承这一几何结构，决定鲁棒PoA界的最坏情况纯纳什均衡表现为拓扑不稳定的严格鞍点，而在典型拥塞博弈中，则表现为由几乎处处严格占优策略支撑的全局排斥子。将效率保证锚定于这些不稳定状态会导致代数敏感性；我们证明，容纳所有严格正仿射成本将使PoA无界。此外，将学习轨迹投影到相关策略的离散单纯形上，会系统地容纳非理性化行为。通过粗相关均衡或近端精炼来评估动力学，无法排除严格占优策略。而且，最优的 $O(1/T)$ 交换遗憾最小化并不能排除宏观湍流，即使在最小博弈中也会表现为混沌极限集。最后，我们考察了拥塞博弈的非原子极限。尽管该极限被认为高度稳定且具有紧致的次线性 $Θ(p/\ln p)$ PoA界（其中 $p$ 为多项式次数），我们证明在离散时间学习下，唯一均衡会失稳为李-约克混沌和全局吸引子，其时间平均低效性呈 $2^p$ 指数级恶化。这些结果要求重新评估用于动态基础度量的最坏情况均衡框架。

title: When Local Monitors Miss Compositional Harm: Diagnosing Distributed Backdoors in Multi-Agent Systems
abstract: As multi-agent, tool-using LLM systems are deployed, a common safety net is a runtime monitor that checks each message, tool call, or step on its own. We show this net has a fundamental hole. A distributed backdoor splits a harmful payload across agents, so every local check passes while the assembled object is the attack. The monitor can be right on every step and still miss the attack. The problem is not splitting itself: split fragments can still leak suspicious tokens or provenance edges. The hard case is \emph{local benignness}. No fragment carries the harm, and what is left looks like ordinary benign traffic. We formalize this as an \emph{observability boundary}: a monitor catches only what its view can tell apart from benign traffic. We prove that once the fragments look benign in the monitored view, no detector on that view can catch them, however strong it is. Across a controlled testbed, an external benchmark, and end-to-end agent runs, local monitors lose the signal exactly as local evidence disappears, and it returns only when the monitor sees the assembled object. A monitor trained only on benign traffic recovers the attack's code structure across held-out encodings (0.874 mean AUROC). A decoded-view gate, given the encoding family, blocks every tested attack. But seeing more is not enough: full-trace monitors and decoders still fail unless they reach the representation where the payload is exposed. Local safety is not global safety when harm is compositional, and the open problem is finding that representation.
tldr: 该论文揭示了多智能体系统中分布式后门攻击的威胁，证明局部监控无法检测到组合性危害，并提出了基于解码视图的防御方法。
abstract_cn: 随着基于多智能体、使用工具的LLM系统被部署，一种常见的安全防护措施是运行时监控器，它独立检查每条消息、每次工具调用或每个步骤。我们证明这种防护存在根本性漏洞。分布式后门将有害负载分散到多个智能体中，使得每个局部检查均能通过，而组装后的整体对象却是攻击本身。监控器可能对每个步骤的判断都正确，却仍然无法发现攻击。问题并非在于拆分本身：拆分后的片段仍可能泄露可疑的令牌或溯源边。真正的难点在于“局部无害性”：没有任何片段携带危害，剩余部分看起来与普通良性流量无异。我们将此形式化为“可观测性边界”：监控器只能捕获其视角中能与良性流量区分开的内容。我们证明，一旦片段在监控视角中表现为良性，无论检测器多强大，都无法在该视角下捕获它们。在受控测试平台、外部基准测试以及端到端智能体运行中，局部监控器恰好随着局部证据的消失而丢失信号，且仅当监控器看到组装后的整体对象时信号才重新出现。仅用良性流量训练的监控器能在未见过的编码方式中恢复攻击的代码结构（平均AUROC为0.874）。给定编码族后，解码视图门控可阻断所有测试的攻击。但扩大视野并不足够：除非全迹监控器与解码器能触及负载暴露的表示层，否则它们仍会失效。当危害具有组合性时，局部安全并非全局安全，而开放性问题在于如何找到该表示层。

title: HiFi-LLP: High-Fidelity, Low-Cost Latency Predictors with Confidence for Robust HW-NAS
abstract: With deep neural networks (DNNs) increasingly deployed on edge devices, hardware (HW)-aware optimization techniques--such as HW-aware compression and HW-aware neural architecture search (HW-NAS)--have become essential. These methods rely on real feedback from the target hardware to tailor DNN architectures for efficient deployment. While the search can be parallelized, latency measurements via hardware-in-the-loop (HIL) remain a bottleneck due to their sequential nature. Recent approaches use latency predictors to replace costly HIL feedback, but challenges persist: (1) platform-specific predictors often require tens of thousands of samples, and (2) inaccurate predictions can mislead the NAS process. To address this, we introduce HiFi-LLP, a high-fidelity, low-cost latency predictor based on graph attention networks, augmented with a confidence metric. HiFi-LLP outperforms prior platform-specific predictors by up to 9 percentage points (p.p.) in the 10% accuracy bound and achieves a Spearman's rank correlation of up to 0.996 across six devices in the LatBench dataset. We further propose a hybrid NAS framework that routes low-confidence predictions to HIL, achieving up to 8.6$\times$ speedup compared to typical NAS while maintaining a competitive Pareto front.
tldr: 该论文提出HiFi-LLP，一种基于图注意力网络的高保真低代价延迟预测器，用于加速硬件感知的神经网络架构搜索，通过置信度指标混合预测和硬件测量，实现高达8.6倍加速。
abstract_cn: 随着深度神经网络（DNN）在边缘设备上的部署日益广泛，硬件感知优化技术——如硬件感知压缩与硬件感知神经架构搜索（HW-NAS）——已变得至关重要。这些方法依赖目标硬件的真实反馈，以定制适合高效部署的DNN架构。尽管搜索过程可以并行化，但通过硬件在环（HIL）进行的延迟测量因其顺序特性而成为瓶颈。近期研究采用延迟预测器替代昂贵的HIL反馈，但挑战依然存在：（1）特定平台的预测器通常需要数万个样本；（2）不准确的预测可能误导NAS过程。为解决这一问题，我们提出了HiFi-LLP——一种基于图注意力网络的高保真、低成本延迟预测器，并辅以置信度指标。在LatBench数据集的六个设备上，HiFi-LLP在10%精度边界内比先前的平台特定预测器性能提升高达9个百分点（p.p.），且斯皮尔曼秩相关系数最高达0.996。我们进一步提出了一种混合NAS框架，将低置信度预测路由至HIL，与典型NAS相比实现了最高8.6倍的加速，同时保持了具有竞争力的帕累托前沿。

title: NeuralActuator: Neural Actuation Modeling for Robot Dynamics and External Force Perception
abstract: Differentiable simulators have advanced policy learning and model-based control, yet actuator dynamics remain an important source of sim-to-real error. This is particularly acute on low-cost platforms, where the linear current-to-torque relation $τ= K_tI$ becomes unreliable during commanded-target tracking because of friction, hysteresis, backlash, and thermal effects. We present NeuralActuator, a neural actuator model that jointly predicts (i) a simulator-equivalent generalized-effort surrogate for trajectory propagation on low-cost servo platforms, (ii) external force with a contact-probability gate for sensorless force perception, and (iii) a motor-condition score for the supervised joint. We also introduce the Neural Actuation Dataset (NAD), collected with a twin-arm teleoperation system that records robot states and actuator telemetry together with external-force labels. The torque-surrogate head is trained through differentiable simulation from pose trajectories without direct generalized-effort labels, while the force, gate, and motor-condition heads receive direct supervision. A Transformer captures temporal dependencies while supporting real-time inference. We evaluate NeuralActuator on a 5-DoF OpenManipulator-X, a 6-DoF SO-101, and a 7-DoF Franka Emika Panda, spanning three actuator families and platforms costing approximately USD 500 to over USD 30,000. The low-cost platforms support dynamics and force evaluation, while the offline Franka experiment provides an additional payload-force-estimation benchmark. Experiments further demonstrate its application for motor condition estimation on OpenManipulator-X and improved behavior-cloning performance when NeuralActuator is used as a pretrained module.
tldr: 该论文提出NeuralActuator，一种神经驱动模型，用于机器人动力学仿真和外部力感知，通过可微仿真和Transformer实现低成本平台的精确控制。
abstract_cn: 可微分模拟器推动了策略学习与基于模型的控制的发展，然而执行器动力学仍然是仿真到现实误差的重要来源。这一问题在低成本平台上尤为突出，在这些平台上，由于摩擦、迟滞、间隙和热效应的影响，线性电流-转矩关系$τ= K_tI$在指令目标跟踪过程中变得不可靠。我们提出了NeuralActuator，这是一种神经执行器模型，能够联合预测：(i) 用于低成本伺服平台轨迹传播的、与模拟器等效的广义力替代量；(ii) 带有接触概率门控的外部力，用于无传感器力感知；(iii) 用于监督关节的电机状态评分。我们还引入了神经驱动数据集（NAD），该数据集通过双臂遥操作系统采集，记录了机器人状态、执行器遥测数据以及外部力标签。转矩替代头通过可微分模拟从位姿轨迹进行训练，无需直接的广义力标签，而力、门控和电机状态头则接受直接监督。Transformer在支持实时推理的同时捕捉时间依赖性。我们在5自由度OpenManipulator-X、6自由度SO-101和7自由度Franka Emika Panda上评估了NeuralActuator，涵盖了三个执行器系列以及成本从约500美元到超过30,000美元的多种平台。低成本平台支持动力学与力评估，而离线Franka实验则提供了额外的负载力估计基准。实验进一步展示了其在OpenManipulator-X上用于电机状态估计的应用，以及当NeuralActuator作为预训练模块使用时，能够提升行为克隆性能。

title: Time-Lag-Aware Deep Reinforcement Learning for Flexible Job-Shop Scheduling in PPVC Module Factories
abstract: Prefabricated prefinished volumetric construction moves most building work into module factories, whose production floor operates as a flexible job shop. A major complication is decisive: long post-operation time-lags caused by concrete curing, watertightness ponding tests, and paint drying, during which a module is blocked while its workstation stays free. On benchmark instances grounded in an official national prefabrication guidebook, these lags inflate even the optimal reference makespan by about 67% on average, and ignoring them at decision time, then repairing to feasibility, is worse than every dispatching rule. We adapt a state-of-the-art dual-attention deep reinforcement learning solver through three minimally invasive, individually ablatable extensions: lag-aware dynamics with an admissible reward bound, two anticipatory lag feature channels, and liveness-masked operation- and station-type embeddings. With every extension disabled the implementation reproduces the original solver exactly, so all gains are attributable to the adaptations. We release a public, guidebook-grounded benchmark generator. On held-out instances the learned policy is the strongest solver-free scheduler: it reaches within about 4% of a constraint-programming reference and beats every dispatching rule and a genetic-algorithm metaheuristic, with its advantage widening under capacity contention, and a single size-mixed policy carries this lead across the trained range of factory sizes. It needs no solver, model, or license in the loop and re-plans within seconds of a disruption; where an exact solver can be deployed, that solver remains the quality ceiling, a boundary we map explicitly.
tldr: 该论文提出一种时间滞后感知的深度强化学习方法，用于解决预制装配式建筑模块工厂中的柔性作业车间调度问题，显著优于传统调度规则和遗传算法。
abstract_cn: 预制装配式立体化施工将大部分建筑工作转移至模块工厂，其生产车间以柔性作业车间模式运行。一个关键性复杂因素在于：混凝土养护、防水闭水试验及油漆干燥等工序导致的长时间后处理时滞——在此期间模块被阻塞而工位保持空闲。基于国家官方预制指南的基准实例显示，这些时滞平均会使最优参考完工时间膨胀约67%；若在决策时忽略该因素而后再修复至可行方案，其效果甚至劣于任何调度规则。我们通过三项微创、可独立消融的扩展模块，对前沿的双注意力深度强化学习求解器进行适配：具有可接受奖励边界的时滞感知动态机制、两个预见性时滞特征通道，以及活性掩码操作与工位类型嵌入。当所有扩展模块禁用时，实现代码可精确复现原始求解器，因此所有性能提升均可归因于这些适配改进。我们发布了基于官方指南的公开基准生成器。在保留实例上，学习策略成为最强的无求解器调度方案：其性能距离约束规划参考值约4%，优于所有调度规则及遗传算法元启发式方法，且在产能竞争加剧时优势进一步扩大；单一混合规模策略可在训练覆盖的工厂规模范围内保持领先优势。该方案无需在运行循环中依赖求解器、模型或许可证，可在数秒内完成中断后的重新规划；当可部署精确求解器时，该求解器仍构成质量上限——这一边界我们已明确标定。
