title: Adapting Evidential Neural Networks to Test-Time Neighbor Fusion Improves Molecular Property Prediction
abstract: A trained molecular property model can be refined at test time by correcting each prediction with the measured labels of the most similar training molecules, a retraining-free procedure we call neighbor fusion; evidential neural networks make it principled by using their aleatoric and epistemic uncertainty to parameterize a Bayesian update. Our main contribution, PG-EVIKAL, learns a property-distance metric to re-rank structurally similar neighbors by their property relevance before fusion, building on EVIKAL (scalar Kalman filter) and GP-EVIKAL (Gaussian process variant handling correlated neighbors). Evaluated on 16 molecular datasets, PG-EVIKAL reduces RMSE relative to the evidential model baseline on 14 of them, with a median reduction of 19.4%, and improves calibration; in sequential-assay scenarios it further incorporates newly measured molecules, refining predictions as they arrive without retraining. This work demonstrates that evidential uncertainty decomposition is not merely a calibration objective but an actionable inference resource that enables test-time refinement of molecular property predictions.
tldr: 该论文提出PG-EVIKAL方法，通过测试时邻居融合改进分子性质预测，利用证据神经网络的不确定性进行贝叶斯更新，在16个数据集上降低RMSE中位数19.4%。
abstract_cn: 一个经过训练的分子性质模型可在测试阶段通过利用最相似训练分子的实测标签对每个预测进行校正来加以优化，这种无需重新训练的方法我们称之为邻域融合；证据神经网络通过使用其偶然不确定性与认知不确定性对贝叶斯更新进行参数化，使该方法具有理论依据。我们的主要贡献——PG-EVIKAL，在EVIKAL（标量卡尔曼滤波器）和GP-EVIKAL（处理相关邻域的高斯过程变体）的基础上，学习一种性质-距离度量，在融合前根据性质相关性对结构相似的邻域进行重新排序。在16个分子数据集上的评估表明，PG-EVIKAL在其中14个数据集上相对于证据模型基线降低了均方根误差（RMSE），中位降幅达19.4%，并改善了校准效果；在序贯检测场景中，该方法还能进一步整合新测量的分子，在无需重新训练的情况下随着新数据的到来不断优化预测。本研究表明，证据不确定性分解不仅是一种校准目标，更是一种可操作的推理资源，能够实现分子性质预测的测试阶段优化。

title: Link Adaptation Using Joint-Thompson Sampling
abstract: The choice of Modulation and Coding (MCS) type for a particular channel condition is made through link adaptation (LA) algorithms that operate at the MAC layer. These algorithms rely on the ACK/NACK statistics and the channel quality index (CQI) feedback. Several existing works model LA as a multi-armed bandit (MAB) problem across cellular and Wi-Fi links. In the MAB formulation, each available MCS is a Bernoulli arm parameterized by its transmission success probability, and the goal is to design a selection strategy that accrues maximum reward. Several popular MAB algorithms, such as upper confidence bound (UCB) and Thompson Sampling (TS), have been proposed in the literature. Using the fact that MCS success probabilities are ordered, we propose the Joint-Thompson Sampling (Joint-TS) algorithm. Unlike classical TS, which assumes independent Beta distributions for each arm, Joint-TS utilizes a multivariate ordered Beta distribution as the prior to preserve the inherent monotonicity of success probabilities. Our simulation results show that while existing MAB algorithms fail in specific scenarios, Joint-TS delivers competitive throughput with robust, consistent performance in all scenarios.
tldr: 该论文提出Joint-Thompson Sampling算法用于链路自适应中的MCS选择，利用有序Beta分布保持成功概率的单调性，仿真显示其性能优于传统MAB算法。
abstract_cn: 针对特定信道条件选择调制与编码（MCS）类型，是通过运行于媒体接入控制（MAC）层的链路自适应（LA）算法实现的。这些算法依赖于确认/否定确认（ACK/NACK）统计信息及信道质量指示（CQI）反馈。现有若干研究将LA建模为多臂老虎机（MAB）问题，应用于蜂窝网络和Wi-Fi链路。在MAB框架中，每个可用MCS均被视为一个伯努利臂，其参数由传输成功概率决定，目标在于设计一种能获取最大累积奖励的选择策略。文献中已提出多种主流MAB算法，例如上置信界（UCB）算法和汤普森采样（TS）算法。基于MCS成功概率具有有序性的特点，我们提出了联合汤普森采样（Joint-TS）算法。与经典TS假设各臂服从独立Beta分布不同，Joint-TS采用多元有序Beta分布作为先验分布，以保持成功概率固有的单调性。仿真结果表明，现有MAB算法在特定场景下会失效，而Joint-TS在所有场景中均能提供具有竞争力的吞吐量，并展现出稳健且一致的性能表现。

reasons: 接近喜欢过的《MLLMRec: A Preference Reasoning Paradigm w》

title: AeroMELD: A Linear Embedding of Aerosol Populations for Diagnostics and Latent Dynamics
abstract: Accurately representing atmospheric aerosol populations is essential for simulating aerosol-cloud interactions, radiative forcing, and ice nucleation, yet existing reduced schemes impose structural assumptions that limit their ability to capture composition diversity and mixing state. Machine-learning approaches offer more flexible representations, but standard autoencoders do not preserve the mathematical structure of aerosol populations and therefore cannot support physically meaningful process operators. We introduce AeroMELD (Aerosol Measure Embedding for Latent Dynamics), a mathematically grounded framework for constructing low-dimensional latent variables that retain this structure. We show that any permutation-invariant linear encoder must take a scale-shape decomposition, with total number concentration represented explicitly and latent shape given by a barycentric combination of per-particle embeddings. This aggregated latent state retains the diagnostic expressiveness of a Deep Sets model by moving the nonlinear post-aggregation stage into the learned diagnostic map while preserving latent linearity. Using particle-resolved data as ground truth, we encode weighted particle populations directly rather than binned aerosol states; size-resolved mass and number distributions serve only as diagnostic targets and visual summaries. The latent space accurately reconstructs these distributions, CCN spectra, optical coefficients, and immersion-freezing behavior while preserving the linear population structure needed for hybrid ML-physics models. Although the experiments focus on diagnostic reconstruction, the embedding is designed so that emissions and mixing can be represented exactly and nonlinear microphysical processes learned in a controlled latent space. This work establishes a foundation for learning aerosol-process evolution directly in latent space.
tldr: 该论文提出AeroMELD框架，通过线性嵌入保留气溶胶群体的数学结构，实现诊断重建和潜在动力学学习，但完全不涉及推荐系统。
abstract_cn: 准确表征大气气溶胶群体对于模拟气溶胶-云相互作用、辐射强迫以及冰核形成至关重要，然而现有的简化方案施加了结构假设，限制了其捕捉成分多样性和混合状态的能力。机器学习方法提供了更灵活的表征方式，但标准自编码器无法保留气溶胶群体的数学结构，因此不能支持具有物理意义的过程算子。我们提出了AeroMELD（用于潜动力学的气溶胶度量嵌入），这是一个基于数学理论的框架，用于构建保留该结构的低维潜变量。我们证明，任何置换不变的线性编码器必须采用尺度-形状分解，其中总数浓度被显式表示，而潜形状由每个粒子嵌入的重心组合给出。这种聚合的潜状态通过将非线性后聚合阶段移至学习到的诊断映射中，同时保持潜空间的线性，保留了Deep Sets模型的诊断表达能力。以粒子解析数据为基准，我们直接对加权粒子群体进行编码，而非对分档的气溶胶状态进行编码；按粒径解析的质量和数浓度分布仅作为诊断目标和可视化摘要。潜空间能够准确重建这些分布、CCN（云凝结核）谱、光学系数以及浸没冻结行为，同时保留了混合机器学习-物理模型所需的线性群体结构。尽管实验聚焦于诊断重建，但该嵌入的设计使得排放和混合过程能够被精确表征，而非线性微物理过程则可在受控的潜空间中进行学习。本工作为直接在潜空间中学习气溶胶过程演化奠定了基础。

title: Metacognition in LLMs: Foundations, Progress, and Opportunities
abstract: Metacognition is a foundational component of intelligence critical to effective learning, problem solving, decision-making, communication, and more. In recent years, it has become increasingly recognized as a cornerstone of capable, transparent AI systems. Yet while LLMs have made significant progress across diverse real-world tasks, it is not yet clear when, how, or to what extent they can exhibit or be endowed with effective metacognitive abilities, nor how such abilities can be adapted to advance the fundamental capabilities, reliability, and intelligence of AI systems. This paper bridges this gap by presenting the first comprehensive overview of the current state of knowledge on metacognition for LLMs. We analyze and taxonomize the landscape of this emerging field and summarize recent technical advancements, including methods and benchmarks to measure and evaluate LLMs' metacognitive abilities, techniques to elicit, improve, and apply metacognition in LLMs, and findings and implications of ongoing research. We also discuss applications, open questions and challenges, and promising directions for future work. Our aim is to provide a detailed and up-to-date review of this topic and stimulate meaningful research and discussion. An organized list of papers can be found at https://github.com/yale-nlp/LLM-Metacognition.
tldr: 该论文综述了大型语言模型中元认知的研究现状，包括评估方法、提升技术和应用前景，但未涉及推荐系统。
abstract_cn: 元认知（Metacognition）是智力的基础组成部分，对于有效学习、问题解决、决策制定、沟通交流等至关重要。近年来，它日益被视为具备能力且透明的AI系统的基石。然而，尽管大语言模型（LLMs）在各类现实任务中取得了显著进展，但目前尚不清楚它们何时、以何种方式或在何种程度上能够展现或具备有效的元认知能力，也不清楚如何利用这些能力来提升AI系统的基础能力、可靠性和智能水平。本文通过首次全面综述LLMs元认知领域的现有知识现状，填补了这一空白。我们分析并分类了这一新兴领域的研究格局，总结了近期技术进展，包括用于测量和评估LLMs元认知能力的方法与基准、在LLMs中激发、改进和应用元认知的技术，以及当前研究中的发现与启示。我们还讨论了应用场景、未解决问题与挑战，以及未来工作的有前景方向。我们的目标是提供关于该主题的详细且最新的综述，并激发有意义的研究与讨论。相关论文的有序列表可参见 https://github.com/yale-nlp/LLM-Metacognition。

title: LoRA-Based Cascaded Multimodal Fusion for Action Recognition in Medical Training Environments
abstract: This paper presents a cascaded Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA)-based multimodal fusion framework for action and activity recognition in healthcare-oriented training environments. The proposed architecture combines parameter-efficient modality-specific adaptation with sequential fusion, enabling modalities to be integrated in stages without retraining previously learned components. Rather than assuming a fixed fusion structure, the framework first integrates more closely related modalities and then incorporates additional heterogeneous modalities, supporting scalable adaptation across datasets with different modality sets.We evaluate the framework on two healthcare-oriented training environment datasets: NurViD and the Nurse Training dataset. Across these datasets, preliminary results suggest that the proposed cascaded fusion strategy improves over individual modality models and provides competitive performance relative to previously reported dataset-specific baselines. Overall, these findings indicate that cascaded LoRA-based fusion is a promising parameter-efficient approach for integrating heterogeneous modalities in medical training action and activity recognition tasks. github: https://github.com/anonymous0-ai/LoRA-Based-Cascaded-Multimodal-Fusion-.git.
tldr: 该论文提出了一种基于LoRA的级联多模态融合框架，用于医疗培训环境中的动作识别，实验表明该方法在NurViD和护士训练数据集上优于单模态模型。
abstract_cn: 本文提出了一种基于级联低秩自适应（LoRA）的多模态融合框架，用于医疗保健导向训练环境中的动作与活动识别。该架构将参数高效的模态特异性自适应与顺序融合相结合，使得各模态能够分阶段集成，而无需重新训练先前已学习的组件。该框架并非假定固定的融合结构，而是首先整合关联更紧密的模态，随后再纳入额外的异质模态，从而支持在不同模态集的数据集上进行可扩展的自适应。我们在两个面向医疗保健训练环境的数据集——NurViD与护士训练数据集（Nurse Training dataset）上对该框架进行了评估。初步结果表明，所提出的级联融合策略相较于单一模态模型有所改进，并且相对于先前报道的特定数据集基线方法，提供了具有竞争力的性能。总体而言，这些发现表明，基于级联LoRA的融合是一种有前景的参数高效方法，可用于医疗训练动作与活动识别任务中异质模态的整合。GitHub：https://github.com/anonymous0-ai/LoRA-Based-Cascaded-Multimodal-Fusion-.git。

title: Evidence-Backed Video Question Answering
abstract: Current Video Large Language Models (Video LLMs) excel in question answering (QA) but largely operate as black boxes, providing textual answers without verifiable visual grounding. Existing explainability efforts rely on textual rationales or sparse bounding boxes, which struggle to capture complex video dynamics such as occlusions and non-rigid deformations. We propose Evidence-Backed Video Question Answering (E-VQA), a novel task requiring models to jointly output a semantic answer and precise spatio-temporal evidence: temporal segments and dense, tracked object segmentation masklets. To support this, we introduce ST-Evidence, the first human-verified benchmark for both discriminative and generative pixel-level grounding. Evaluations of state-of-the-art models reveal a critical decoupling between QA accuracy and true visual perception that scaling alone fails to bridge. To address this, we develop scalable, automated generation pipelines to create ST-Evidence-Instruct, a 160k-scale dataset bridging high-level reasoning with fine-grained grounding. Fine-tuning grounded Video LLMs on this data yields substantial gains over the corresponding size-matched UniPixel baselines (e.g., +27.2 t-mean and +13.8 J&F on a 7B model), establishing a robust baseline for explainable, evidence-backed video understanding. Code and data are available at https://github.com/SalesforceAIResearch/EVQA.
tldr: 论文提出证据支持的视频问答任务（E-VQA），要求模型输出答案和时空证据，并构建了基准数据集和自动化生成管道，实验表明微调后的视频LLM在可解释视频理解上取得显著提升。
abstract_cn: 当前视频大语言模型（Video LLMs）在问答（QA）任务中表现优异，但大多以黑箱方式运行，仅提供文本答案而缺乏可验证的视觉依据。现有的可解释性研究依赖于文本解释或稀疏的边界框，难以应对遮挡、非刚性形变等复杂视频动态。我们提出证据支持视频问答（E-VQA），这是一个新任务，要求模型同时输出语义答案与精确的时空证据：时间片段以及密集、可追踪的目标分割掩码片段（masklets）。为此，我们引入ST-Evidence，这是首个经人工验证的、同时支持判别式与生成式像素级定位的基准数据集。对现有最先进模型的评估揭示了一个关键问题：问答准确率与真实视觉感知之间存在显著脱节，且仅通过扩大模型规模无法弥合这一差距。为解决该问题，我们开发了可扩展的自动化生成流程，构建了包含16万样本规模的ST-Evidence-Instruct数据集，将高层推理与细粒度定位相连接。基于该数据对具备定位能力的视频大语言模型进行微调，相较于相应规模匹配的UniPixel基线模型取得了显著提升（例如，在7B模型上t-mean提升27.2%，J&F提升13.8%），为可解释、证据支持的视频理解建立了稳健基线。代码与数据已开源：https://github.com/SalesforceAIResearch/EVQA。

title: Introducing Human-Centeredness in AI-Assisted Lexicography
abstract: This paper proposes a human-centered artificial intelligence (HCAI) framework for AI-assisted lexicography. While generative AI offers significant opportunities to enhance lexicographic work, it also raises concerns regarding the future role of lexicographers and the preservation of linguistic and cultural diversity. Drawing on HCAI principles and previous applications in other language professions, the paper identifies four interrelated dimensions through which AI integration in lexicography can be understood and critically examined: the augmented lexicographer, the sociotechnical context of AI integration, bias, and the design of AI-powered lexicographic tools. The framework argues that AI should augment rather than replace lexicographers, combining high levels of automation with meaningful human control. It further emphasizes the importance of preserving professional agency, mitigating AI-generated biases, and designing tools around the needs of lexicographers. By doing so, the paper provides a foundation for future research and the beneficial integration of AI into lexicographic workflows.
tldr: 该论文提出了一个人工智能辅助词典编纂的人本中心框架，强调AI应增强而非取代词典编纂者，并关注专业自主性、偏见缓解和工具设计。
abstract_cn: 本文提出了一个以人为中心的人工智能（human-centered artificial intelligence, HCAI）框架，用于人工智能辅助词典编纂（AI-assisted lexicography）。尽管生成式人工智能（generative AI）为提升词典编纂工作提供了重要机遇，但也引发了对词典编纂者未来角色以及语言与文化多样性保护的担忧。基于HCAI原则及其在语言相关其他领域的先前应用，本文识别出四个相互关联的维度，通过这些维度可以理解并批判性地审视人工智能在词典编纂中的整合：增强型词典编纂者（augmented lexicographer）、人工智能整合的社会技术背景（sociotechnical context）、偏见（bias）以及人工智能驱动的词典编纂工具（AI-powered lexicographic tools）的设计。该框架主张，人工智能应增强而非取代词典编纂者，将高度自动化与有意义的人类控制相结合。它进一步强调了维护专业自主性、减轻人工智能生成的偏见以及围绕词典编纂者的需求设计工具的重要性。通过这种方式，本文为未来研究以及将人工智能有益地整合到词典编纂工作流程中奠定了基础。

title: MM-ToolSandBox: A Unified Framework for Evaluating Visual Tool-Calling Agents
abstract: We introduce MM-ToolSandBox, a benchmark and evaluation framework for visually grounded tool-calling agents. The framework provides a stateful execution environment spanning 500+ tools across 16 application domains, supporting multi-image, multi-turn tasks where agents must ground progressively arriving visual inputs into executable tool calls while handling realistic conversational phenomena (goal revisions, error corrections, state mutations). An automated scenario generation pipeline produces diverse, visually grounded scenarios through information-flow-guided planning and multi-stage quality filtering, yielding 258 human-verified nominal scenarios and 50 variants targeting interactive UI applications. Evaluating 12 state-of-the-art models, from 4B open-weight to frontier proprietary systems, shows that current models still lack robust visual tool-calling capability: even the best model achieves below 50% success rate. Our failure analysis further reveals that visual precision, not only planning, is a primary bottleneck for capable models: 53% of failures stem from incorrect information extraction from images despite otherwise correct task workflows. A planning-to-precision crossover emerges with scale: smaller models fail at deciding what to do, while larger models fail at perceiving what they see, suggesting fundamentally different research directions for improving models at different capability levels. The framework and the benchmark are publicly available at https://github.com/apple/ml-mmtoolsandbox
tldr: 该论文提出了MM-ToolSandBox，一个用于评估视觉工具调用智能体的基准和框架，发现当前模型在视觉精度和规划能力上存在不足。
abstract_cn: 我们提出了MM-ToolSandBox，一个面向视觉基础工具调用智能体的基准测试与评估框架。该框架提供了一个跨16个应用领域、涵盖500余种工具的状态化执行环境，支持多图像、多轮次任务——智能体需将逐步到达的视觉输入转化为可执行的工具调用，同时处理现实对话现象（目标修正、错误纠正、状态变更）。通过信息流引导规划与多阶段质量过滤，自动化场景生成流水线可产生多样化、视觉基础化的场景，最终得到258个人工验证的标准场景及50个针对交互式UI应用的变体场景。对12个最先进模型（从40亿参数开源模型到前沿闭源系统）的评估表明，当前模型仍缺乏稳健的视觉工具调用能力：即便最优模型的成功率也低于50%。进一步的失败分析揭示，视觉精度（而非规划能力）是能力较强模型的主要瓶颈——53%的失败源于从图像中提取信息错误，尽管其任务流程本身正确。随着模型规模增大，出现从规划到精度的能力交叉：较小模型在“决定做什么”上失败，而较大模型在“感知所见内容”上失败，这为不同能力层级的模型改进指明了根本不同的研究方向。该框架与基准测试已开源发布于https://github.com/apple/ml-mmtoolsandbox。

title: StoryTeller: Training-Free Narrative Grounding for Long-Form Audio Description
abstract: Long-form audio description (AD) requires more than describing visible actions: it must preserve characters, events, relationships, and story context across scenes so that blind and low-vision (BLV) audiences can follow a film. Modern video-language models (VLMs) are effective on short clips, but they often treat each moment independently, producing descriptions that miss who characters are, why events matter, and how the current scene connects to earlier narrative context. We propose StoryTeller, a training-free framework for story-aware long-form AD. Instead of relying only on local visual cues, StoryTeller maintains a verified narrative memory that carries forward story-relevant information across scenes, enabling later descriptions to remain coherent, grounded, and contextually informative. Given only raw video and a movie title, StoryTeller can optionally retrieve public movie metadata to resolve names and story context, while accepting only facts that are supported by the video through semantic filtering and VLM verification. The method requires no subtitles, scripts, AD transcripts, aligned captions, character banks, precomputed face identities, or task-specific fine-tuning. To evaluate whether generated AD preserves narrative information, we introduce StoryAD-QA, a question-answering benchmark that tests whether a language model can answer story-context questions using only the generated descriptions. Experiments on standard AD benchmarks and diverse long-form videos show that StoryTeller consistently improves narrative coherence, factual grounding, and story comprehension over strong baselines in automatic, QA-based, and human evaluations.
tldr: StoryTeller提出了一种无需训练的视频描述框架，通过维护叙事记忆来生成连贯的长视频音频描述，显著提升了叙事连贯性和事实准确性。
abstract_cn: 长篇音频描述（AD）不仅需要描述可见动作，还必须保留跨场景的角色、事件、关系及故事背景，以便盲人与低视力（BLV）观众能够理解电影情节。现代视频-语言模型（VLM）在处理短视频片段时表现良好，但往往独立处理每个时刻，生成的描述会遗漏角色身份、事件重要性以及当前场景与先前叙事背景之间的关联。我们提出StoryTeller，一种无需训练的故事感知型长篇音频描述框架。StoryTeller不依赖局部视觉线索，而是维护一个经过验证的叙事记忆，该记忆能够跨场景传递故事相关信息，使后续描述保持连贯、有据可依且富含上下文信息。仅需原始视频和电影名称，StoryTeller可选择性地检索公开电影元数据以解析角色名称与故事背景，同时通过语义过滤和VLM验证仅接受视频支持的事实。该方法无需字幕、剧本、音频描述文本、对齐字幕、角色库、预计算人脸身份或特定任务微调。为评估生成的音频描述是否保留叙事信息，我们引入StoryAD-QA，这是一个问答基准测试，用于检验语言模型能否仅凭生成的描述回答故事上下文问题。在标准音频描述基准测试及多种长篇视频上的实验表明，在自动评估、基于问答的评估及人工评估中，StoryTeller在叙事连贯性、事实依据及故事理解方面持续优于强基线方法。

title: Encoder-Side Neuron Identification and Amplification for Acoustic Perception in Large Audio-Language Models
abstract: Large audio-language models (LALMs) often underperform on fine-grained, non-semantic attributes of speech, such as a speaker's emotion, despite strong performance on speech content. Improving this without the cost of retraining calls for an effective inference-time intervention, yet most existing methods intervene only after the audio encoder and operate at a relatively coarse granularity. The encoder itself, where acoustic information is first extracted from the waveform, remains largely unexplored, especially at the level of individual neurons. We introduce IAAN, Identifying and Amplifying Acoustic Neurons, a training-free and label-free method that scores each feed-forward neuron in the audio encoder by contrasting its activation on the real waveform with that on a noise reference lacking the real audio's acoustic information. IAAN then amplifies a small set of the highest-scoring neurons at inference. Across ten non-semantic speech attributes, IAAN improves average accuracy by 25.7 points on Audio-Flamingo-3, 21.4 on Qwen2.5-Omni, and 9.7 on Kimi-Audio. It also improves a model already explicitly fine-tuned to prioritize acoustic evidence. In controlled comparisons, both the encoder locus and neuron-level selectivity prove necessary for this gain. Intervening after the encoder, at the decoding side or inside the language model, yields little to no improvement, or even deteriorates accuracy. The improvement also depends on which specific neurons are amplified, not merely on their number, confirming that IAAN's acoustic score succeeds in identifying the neurons that matter. These results show that a small, precisely targeted intervention inside the audio encoder is an effective and largely untapped way to strengthen the acoustic understanding of LALMs, opening a new direction for inference-time methods that improve acoustic perception through neuron-level access to the encoder.
tldr: 论文提出IAAN方法，通过识别并放大音频编码器中对声学信息敏感的神经元，在不重新训练的情况下显著提升大型音频语言模型对非语义语音属性的感知准确率。
abstract_cn: 大型音频-语言模型（Large Audio-Language Models, LALMs）在语音内容处理上表现优异，但在细粒度、非语义的语音属性（如说话者的情绪）上往往表现不佳。在不增加重新训练成本的前提下改进这一缺陷，需要一种有效的推理时干预方法，然而现有大多数方法仅在音频编码器之后进行干预，且操作粒度相对较粗。编码器本身——即从波形中首次提取声学信息的模块——在很大程度上仍未被充分探索，尤其是在单个神经元层面。我们提出了IAAN（Identifying and Amplifying Acoustic Neurons，识别与放大声学神经元），这是一种无需训练、无需标注的方法，通过对比每个前馈神经元在真实波形上的激活与其在缺乏真实音频声学信息的噪声参考上的激活，对音频编码器中的每个前馈神经元进行评分。IAAN随后在推理时放大得分最高的一小部分神经元。在十种非语义语音属性上，IAAN在Audio-Flamingo-3上平均准确率提升25.7个百分点，在Qwen2.5-Omni上提升21.4个百分点，在Kimi-Audio上提升9.7个百分点。该方法还能改进一个已经明确微调以优先处理声学证据的模型。在控制实验中，编码器层面的干预与神经元级别的选择性对于这一提升均不可或缺。在编码器之后（解码侧或语言模型内部）进行干预，几乎无法带来改进，甚至会导致准确率下降。改进效果还取决于具体放大了哪些神经元，而不仅仅是其数量，这证实了IAAN的声学评分能够成功识别出关键神经元。这些结果表明，在音频编码器内部进行小规模、精准定位的干预，是一种有效且尚未被充分利用的增强LALMs声学理解能力的方式，为通过神经元级别的编码器访问来改善声学感知的推理时方法开辟了新方向。

title: Playful AI in Professional Email: A Field Experiment on Tone and Recipient Engagement
abstract: Large language models (LLMs) are rapidly reshaping workplace communication, yet whether AI-assisted writing changes how recipients actually behave, and through what channel, remains unknown. Here, in a randomized crossover field experiment, 121 employees across six companies sent work emails under three conditions over three weeks: unaided writing, GPT-5 rewriting in a playful tone, and GPT-5 rewriting in a professional tone. Across 16,880 emails, playful editing increased emotional positivity (B=+0.068, p<0.001), and professional editing decreased it (B=-0.041, p<0.001), yet neither condition directly altered open rates, reply rates, or response times. Instead, within-sender positivity strongly predicted both opening (OR=2.05) and replying (OR=3.32, p<0.001), a significant indirect pathway through which AI editing shaped behavior, in the absence of any direct effect. These findings suggest that AI-assisted communication shapes workplace engagement not through its use, but through the emotional tone of the language it produces.
tldr: 该论文通过现场实验发现，AI辅助改写邮件语气（俏皮或专业）并不直接影响收件人的打开率、回复率或响应时间，但通过改变发件人的情感积极性间接影响收件人行为。
abstract_cn: 大型语言模型（LLMs）正迅速重塑职场沟通方式，然而，AI辅助写作是否会改变接收者的实际行为，以及通过何种渠道产生影响，目前仍不清楚。本研究通过一项随机交叉现场实验，让来自六家公司的121名员工在三周内分别在三种条件下发送工作邮件：无辅助写作、以俏皮语气进行GPT-5改写、以及以专业语气进行GPT-5改写。在总计16,880封邮件中，俏皮风格编辑提升了情感积极性（B=+0.068，p<0.001），而专业风格编辑则降低了情感积极性（B=-0.041，p<0.001），但两种条件均未直接改变邮件的打开率、回复率或回复时间。相反，发件人自身的情感积极性对邮件打开（OR=2.05）和回复（OR=3.32，p<0.001）均具有显著预测作用，这一间接路径在缺乏直接效应的情况下，构成了AI编辑影响行为的重要机制。这些发现表明，AI辅助沟通并非通过其使用本身，而是通过其所生成语言的情感基调来塑造职场互动。

reasons: 偏好主题：language

title: Evaluating RE Practices for Explainability: Synthesizing Insights from Daimler Truck into an Explainable RE Framework Proposal
abstract: Explainability has emerged as a critical requirement for AI-based systems, particularly in safety-critical and regulated domains. Although prior research has proposed frameworks, patterns, and user-centered approaches to support explainability, there is limited empirical understanding of how existing Requirements Engineering (RE) practices support explainability requirements across the RE lifecycle, especially in an industrial context. This paper reports early findings from an ongoing industry-based study investigating how explainability requirements are elicited, specified, and validated using established RE techniques. We conducted a multi-phase qualitative study with eight practitioners at Daimler Truck, employing think-aloud protocols and moderated group discussions across requirements elicitation, specification, and validation steps. Our preliminary analysis reveals recurring challenges across all steps, including conceptual ambiguity during elicitation, limited testability and expressiveness during specification, and fragmented validation due to vague criteria and regulatory uncertainty. These findings indicate that current RE practices provide limited support to systematically address explainability requirements. The paper contributes empirical insights into step-specific and cross-cutting challenges and outlines a research vision toward developing an empirically grounded RE framework for explainable AI-based systems.
tldr: 该论文通过工业案例研究，探讨了现有需求工程实践在支持AI系统可解释性方面的不足，并提出了构建可解释性需求工程框架的愿景。
abstract_cn: 可解释性已成为基于人工智能的系统的一项关键需求，尤其是在安全关键和受监管领域。尽管已有研究提出了支持可解释性的框架、模式及以用户为中心的方法，但对于现有需求工程（Requirements Engineering, RE）实践如何在RE全生命周期中支持可解释性需求，尤其是在工业环境中的实证理解仍然有限。本文报告了一项正在进行的工业研究的初步发现，该研究探讨了如何利用成熟的RE技术来获取、规约和验证可解释性需求。我们与戴姆勒卡车（Daimler Truck）的八位从业者开展了一项多阶段定性研究，在需求获取、规约和验证步骤中采用了出声思维协议（think-aloud protocols）和有主持的团体讨论。初步分析揭示了所有步骤中反复出现的挑战，包括获取阶段的概念模糊性、规约阶段的可测试性和表达力有限，以及因标准模糊和监管不确定性导致的验证碎片化。这些发现表明，当前的RE实践在系统性地处理可解释性需求方面提供的支持有限。本文为各步骤特有及跨步骤的挑战提供了实证见解，并勾勒出为可解释的基于AI的系统建立基于实证的RE框架的研究愿景。

title: VoxENES 2026: Benchmarking Generalization of Speech Spoofing Detectors Against LLM-Era TTS and Voice Conversion
abstract: Modern LLM-driven text-to-speech (TTS) and voice conversion (VC) systems produce synthetic speech that differs from the generators represented in many legacy spoofing benchmarks. This mismatch creates a temporal generalization gap that can overestimate detector robustness under real-world post-processing conditions. We bridge this gap by introducing VoxENES 2026, a bilingual (English and Spanish) benchmark of 53,628 audio samples generated using 10 contemporary speech synthesis methods and evaluated under 10 standardized post-processing conditions. Using VoxENES 2026, we benchmark eight pretrained detectors without fine-tuning and observe substantial performance degradation: the best model achieves 28.98\% EER overall, while most perform near or below random chance across modern generators and perturbations. Our results highlight the reliance on brittle artifacts in current detectors and establish VoxENES 2026 as a practical testbed for developing robust audio spoofing countermeasures.
tldr: 该论文提出了VoxENES 2026基准，用于评估语音欺骗检测器在LLM时代TTS和VC下的泛化能力，发现现有检测器性能显著下降。
abstract_cn: 现代基于大语言模型的文本转语音（TTS）与语音转换（VC）系统所生成的合成语音，与许多传统欺骗检测基准中表征的生成器存在显著差异。这种不匹配造成了时间泛化鸿沟，可能高估检测器在真实世界后处理条件下的鲁棒性。我们通过引入VoxENES 2026来弥合这一鸿沟——该基准数据集包含53,628个双语（英语与西班牙语）音频样本，采用10种当代语音合成方法生成，并在10种标准化后处理条件下进行评估。利用VoxENES 2026，我们对八个未经微调的预训练检测器进行基准测试，观察到显著的性能退化：最佳模型的总体等错误率（EER）为28.98%，而大多数检测器在现代生成器与扰动条件下的表现接近或低于随机水平。我们的研究结果揭示了当前检测器对脆弱伪影的依赖，并将VoxENES 2026确立为开发鲁棒音频欺骗对抗措施的实际测试平台。

reasons: 偏好主题：systems

title: An Explainable Agentic System for Detection of Conversational Scams with Summary-Based Memory
abstract: Following the rapid progress of generative Artificial Intelligence, there is a growing threat posed by conversational scams. These scams often span over multiple weeks or months, gradually build trust and request for money or sensitive information. Existing scam-detection systems mainly focus on isolated messages, which renders them inadequate against this evolving threat. This paper extends single-message phishing detection and presents an explainable agentic system for detecting sophisticated conversational scams. It also introduces ConScamBench-278, an initial public multi-category benchmark for conversational scam detection spanning eight scam types, released to support reproducible evaluation and future expansion. On isolated messages the single-message detector attains 100% phishing recall, while the conversation-level detector identifies all conversational scams in the public LoveFraud02 corpus (83/83) and reaches 97.8% accuracy (95% CI [95.4, 99.0]) on ConScamBench-278. Two user studies (N = 100 and N = 45) further motivate the system: participants report frequently experiencing uncertainty when judging suspicious conversations. In an uncontrolled pre/post comparison, users self-reported trust, self-confidence, and perceived need for AI-based scam detection all increased (p < 0.001, Wilcoxon signed-rank). The system also receives a System Usability Scale score of 74.7 (95% CI [72.5, 76.9]), above the established usability benchmark.
tldr: 该论文提出一个可解释的智能体系统，利用基于摘要的记忆来检测对话式诈骗，并引入多类别基准数据集，实验表明系统在检测准确率和用户信任方面表现良好。
abstract_cn: 随着生成式人工智能的快速发展，对话式诈骗构成的威胁日益加剧。此类诈骗通常持续数周或数月，逐步建立信任后索要钱财或敏感信息。现有诈骗检测系统主要针对孤立消息，难以应对这种不断演变的威胁。本文在单消息钓鱼检测基础上进行扩展，提出了一种可解释的智能体系统，用于检测复杂的对话式诈骗。同时，本文发布了ConScamBench-278——首个面向对话式诈骗检测的公开多类别基准数据集，涵盖八种诈骗类型，旨在支持可重复性评估及未来扩展。在孤立消息检测中，单消息检测器实现了100%的钓鱼召回率；而对话级检测器在公开的LoveFraud02语料库中识别出全部对话式诈骗（83/83），并在ConScamBench-278上达到97.8%的准确率（95%置信区间[95.4, 99.0]）。两项用户研究（N=100和N=45）进一步验证了该系统的必要性：参与者报告在判断可疑对话时频繁感到不确定。在非受控的前后对比中，用户对基于AI的诈骗检测的信任度、自信心及感知需求均显著提升（p < 0.001，Wilcoxon符号秩检验）。该系统还获得了74.7分的系统可用性量表评分（95%置信区间[72.5, 76.9]），高于既定的可用性基准。

title: Agent Hacks Agent: Autoresearch for Production-Agent Red-Teaming
abstract: Production LLM agents such as Claude Code and Codex operate over untrusted content, files, commands, and workspace state, making safety failures directly actionable. Red-teaming must therefore keep pace with evolving models and tools. Existing approaches mainly optimize attack success and preserve artifacts such as benchmarks, payloads, or attack programs, which record where attacks succeed but not the enabling conditions behind unsafe agent behavior. We study automated red-teaming for production LLM agents using one agentic research environment to discover reusable vulnerability knowledge about another. We present AHA, a falsifiable discovery loop that proposes a vulnerability hypothesis, constructs a falsifier, instantiates a valid attack, executes it in a sandboxed harness, reflects on the trajectory, and promotes confirmed findings into a Vulnerability Concept Graph (VCG). Each concept links an attacker-facing surface to an unsafe trajectory through a claim, enabling condition, falsifier, transfer prediction, and supporting evidence. Across Claude Code and Codex on three scenarios covering direct and indirect attacks, the discovered concepts reveal a reusable vulnerability core across models and agents. A frozen VCG requires no further search and outperforms the strongest frozen discovery baseline by 14.2 percentage points under the same single-shot protocol, while transferring across scenarios and attack channels. The resulting VCG provides an auditable artifact for production safety teams to inspect vulnerabilities, validate patches, and accumulate reusable safety knowledge. Our code is available at https://github.com/henrymao2004/Auto-research-red-teaming-in-sleep.
tldr: 该论文提出AHA框架，通过自动化研究环境发现生产级LLM智能体的可重用漏洞知识，构建漏洞概念图，并在Claude Code和Codex上验证了其有效性。
abstract_cn: 像Claude Code和Codex这样的生产级LLM智能体（agent）会操作不受信任的内容、文件、命令和工作区状态，这使得安全故障可以直接被利用。因此，红队测试（red-teaming）必须跟上不断演进的模型和工具。现有方法主要优化攻击成功率并保留诸如基准测试（benchmark）、载荷（payload）或攻击程序等产物，这些产物记录了攻击成功的位置，但并未揭示不安全智能体行为背后的促成条件。我们研究针对生产级LLM智能体的自动化红队测试，利用一个智能体研究环境来发现关于另一个智能体的可复用漏洞知识。我们提出AHA，一个可证伪的发现循环（falsifiable discovery loop），该循环提出一个漏洞假设（vulnerability hypothesis），构建一个证伪器（falsifier），实例化一个有效攻击，在沙盒化测试框架（sandboxed harness）中执行该攻击，对轨迹进行反思，并将已确认的发现提升到漏洞概念图（Vulnerability Concept Graph, VCG）中。每个概念通过一个主张（claim）、促成条件（enabling condition）、证伪器、迁移预测（transfer prediction）和支持证据（supporting evidence），将攻击者面对的表面（attacker-facing surface）与不安全轨迹关联起来。在覆盖直接攻击和间接攻击的三个场景中，针对Claude Code和Codex所发现的概念揭示了一个跨模型和智能体的可复用漏洞核心。一个冻结的VCG无需进一步搜索，在相同的单次协议（single-shot protocol）下，其性能比最强的冻结发现基线高出14.2个百分点，同时能够跨场景和攻击通道进行迁移。由此产生的VCG为生产安全团队提供了一个可审计的产物，用于检查漏洞、验证补丁并积累可复用的安全知识。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/henrymao2004/Auto-research-red-teaming-in-sleep 获取。

reasons: 偏好主题：zheng

title: Think Through a Bottleneck: Hourglass Reasoning for Rigorous Induction
abstract:
Self-refinement often fails to strengthen few-shot inductive reasoning in large language models. Prompting a model to explicitly state its inferred rule does little on its own. What actually matters is a structurally enforced isolation between reasoning stages, so that information can only pass between them as a compressed symbolic state.
  We introduce \textbf{Hourglass reasoning}, which enforces strict context isolation between reasoning stages. The frozen LLM acts as a meta-constructor, building for each task a symbolic encoder--decoder: an Induction module compresses the support examples into a schema $φ$ (encoder) and a transient scaffold $z$; a Deduction module derives rule $T$ (decoder) from these and discards $z$; an Implementer compiles $(φ, T)$ into artifacts; an error-driven Refiner revises $(φ, T)$ and regenerates artifacts from scratch. Only $(φ, T)$ crosses stage boundaries, so all refinement stays anchored to the rule.
  We evaluate Hourglass across three benchmarks spanning visual abstraction, hardware synthesis, and textual rule induction, using GPT-5.5 and Gemini 3.1 Pro. On ARC-AGI-2, it raises best-of-5 accuracy by up to 14 points over an iterative-refinement baseline. On ChipBench, it nearly doubles Verilog synthesis accuracy with GPT-5.5, from 31\% to 58\%. BBEH-Linguini draws on puzzles from the International Linguistics Olympiad, a setting where prior work has shown that explicit verbalization can hurt performance. Hourglass mitigates this tendency, and on Gemini 3.1 Pro, it reverses the effect entirely.
  Ablations confirm that these gains come from the isolation between stages and the quality of the initial induction, not from prompt wording or the particular symbolic form used. It is how information flows through the reasoning process, rather than the language used to express it, that drives inductive reasoning in frozen LLMs.
tldr: 论文提出Hourglass推理方法，通过强制推理阶段间的上下文隔离，显著提升了大语言模型在少样本归纳推理任务上的表现。
abstract_cn:
自精炼往往难以增强大语言模型中的少样本归纳推理能力。要求模型明确陈述其推断出的规则本身收效甚微。真正关键的是在推理阶段之间实施结构化的强制隔离，使得信息仅能以压缩的符号化状态在阶段间传递。

我们提出**沙漏推理**（Hourglass reasoning），该方法在推理阶段之间强制执行严格的上下文隔离。冻结的大语言模型（LLM）充当元构建器，为每个任务构建一个符号化编码器-解码器：归纳模块（Induction module）将支持样本压缩为模式$φ$（编码器）与临时支架$z$；演绎模块（Deduction module）从这些信息中推导出规则$T$（解码器）并丢弃$z$；执行器（Implementer）将$(φ, T)$编译为工件；错误驱动的精炼器（Refiner）修正$(φ, T)$并从头重新生成工件。仅有$(φ, T)$跨越阶段边界，因此所有精炼过程始终锚定于规则。

我们使用GPT-5.5与Gemini 3.1 Pro，在涵盖视觉抽象、硬件综合与文本规则归纳的三个基准测试上评估沙漏推理。在ARC-AGI-2上，相较于迭代精炼基线，其最佳五次准确率提升高达14个百分点。在ChipBench上，使用GPT-5.5时，其将Verilog综合准确率从31%提升至58%，近乎翻倍。BBEH-Linguini采用国际语言学奥林匹克竞赛的谜题，该场景下先前研究表明显式语言化可能损害性能。沙漏推理缓解了这一趋势，且在Gemini 3.1 Pro上完全逆转了该效应。

消融实验证实，这些增益源于阶段间的隔离与初始归纳的质量，而非提示措辞或所使用的特定符号化形式。驱动冻结LLM中归纳推理的，是信息在推理过程中的流动方式，而非用于表达信息的语言。

title: From World Action Models to Embodied Brains: A Roadmap for Open-World Physical Intelligence
abstract: Artificial general intelligence ultimately requires agents that can reason and act in the physical world. Action models, vision-language-action policies, and world models have advanced this goal, while World Action Models (WAMs) are particularly promising because they connect candidate interventions with predicted consequences. However, progress remains fragmented: models use incompatible action spaces and prediction targets, datasets and tasks follow different conventions, and runtime systems expose limited interfaces for reuse and evaluation. We review the evolution toward WAMs and organize these limitations into three coupled gaps: model roles and representations, objectives and standardization, and system composition. Building on this analysis, we propose a co-evolution roadmap for physical intelligence centered on the \emph{embodied brain}, a long-term model target for integrating multimodal context, comparing candidate interventions, and issuing state-transition or capability requests rather than direct actuator commands. WAMs provide promising prototypes for its predictive functions, while a physical harness grounds model outputs through tools, controllers, verification, and trace logging. Shared contracts align heterogeneous models, data, tasks, and embodiments, and closed-loop post-training converts verified interaction into reusable experience. Together, these components define a modular physical-intelligence stack for adaptive and self-improving embodied agents.
tldr: 该论文提出了一种面向开放世界物理智能的路线图，从世界动作模型到具身大脑，旨在通过模块化物理智能堆栈实现自适应和自我改进的具身智能体。
abstract_cn: 通用人工智能最终需要能够在物理世界中推理和行动的智能体。行动模型、视觉-语言-行动策略以及世界模型推动了这一目标的实现，而世界行动模型（World Action Models, WAMs）尤其具有前景，因为它能够将候选干预措施与预测后果相连接。然而，当前进展仍较为分散：模型使用不兼容的行动空间和预测目标，数据集和任务遵循不同的惯例，运行时系统提供的接口有限，难以用于复用和评估。我们回顾了向WAMs演进的历程，并将这些局限性归纳为三个相互关联的鸿沟：模型角色与表征、目标与标准化、以及系统组合。基于这一分析，我们提出了一条以“具身大脑”（embodied brain）为核心的物理智能协同演进路线图。“具身大脑”是一个长期模型目标，用于整合多模态上下文、比较候选干预措施，并发出状态转换或能力请求，而非直接执行器指令。WAMs为其预测功能提供了有前景的原型，而物理约束系统（physical harness）则通过工具、控制器、验证和追踪日志来落地模型输出。共享契约（shared contracts）协调了异构的模型、数据、任务和具身体，闭环后训练（closed-loop post-training）将经过验证的交互转化为可复用的经验。这些组件共同定义了一个模块化的物理智能栈，用于构建自适应且能够自我改进的具身智能体。

title: RAGU: A Multi-Step GraphRAG Engine with a Compact Domain-Adapted LLM
abstract: Graph retrieval-augmented generation (GraphRAG) enhances large language models with structured knowledge, yet existing systems construct knowledge graphs in a single extraction pass, producing noisy entities and brittle retrieval. RAGU, an open-source modular GraphRAG engine, addresses this by separating extraction from consolidation: entities and relations pass through two-stage typed extraction, DBSCAN-backed deduplication, LLM summarization, and Leiden community detection. A key insight motivates a compact extractor: the skills an in-pipeline LLM needs - comprehension, extraction, reasoning over context - are language skills that grow only weakly with model size, unlike factual world knowledge. Accordingly, we train Meno-Lite-0.1, a 7B model optimized for language skills, which outperforms Qwen2.5-32B on knowledge-graph construction (+12.5% relative harmonic mean) and matches it on English GraphRAG tasks. On GraphRAG-Bench (Medical), RAGU retrieves the most complete context at every factoid level (evidence recall up to 0.84 vs. $\leq$0.76) and overtakes HippoRAG2 on synthesis tasks; on multi-hop factoid QA, the apparent HippoRAG2 advantage is shown to be largely an answer-format artifact. RAGU is installable via $\texttt{pip install graph_ragu}$, runs on a single GPU, and is released under MIT. The source code is publicly available at https://github.com/RaguTeam/RAGU, and the Meno-Lite-0.1 model can be obtained from https://huggingface.co/bond005/meno-lite-0.1.
tldr: 论文提出RAGU，一个多步GraphRAG引擎，通过分离提取与合并、训练紧凑型领域适配LLM Meno-Lite-0.1，在知识图谱构建和检索增强生成任务上超越大模型。
abstract_cn: 图检索增强生成（GraphRAG）利用结构化知识增强大语言模型，但现有系统通过单次提取构建知识图谱，产生噪声实体与脆弱的检索。RAGU作为一种开源模块化GraphRAG引擎，通过将提取与整合分离来解决此问题：实体和关系经过两阶段类型化提取、基于DBSCAN的去重、大语言模型摘要以及Leiden社区检测。一项关键洞察催生了紧凑型提取器：流水线内大语言模型所需的技能——理解、提取、基于上下文的推理——均为语言技能，这些技能随模型规模的增长幅度远弱于事实性世界知识。据此，我们训练了Meno-Lite-0.1，一个针对语言技能优化的7B模型，其在知识图谱构建上超越Qwen2.5-32B（相对调和均值提升12.5%），并在英文GraphRAG任务中与之持平。在GraphRAG-Bench（医学）上，RAGU在每个事实层级检索到最完整的上下文（证据召回率最高达0.84，对比≤0.76），并在合成任务中超越HippoRAG2；在多跳事实型问答中，HippoRAG2的明显优势被证明主要源于答案格式的伪影。RAGU可通过$\texttt{pip install graph_ragu}$安装，在单GPU上运行，并以MIT许可证发布。源代码公开于https://github.com/RaguTeam/RAGU，Meno-Lite-0.1模型可从https://huggingface.co/bond005/meno-lite-0.1获取。

title: Closing the Loop: An Access-Control Architecture for Automated, Anomaly-Driven Network Revocation in IoT Deployments
abstract: Network-based anomaly detection for IoT devices has matured to the point of reporting strong detection accuracy, yet most published systems stop at raising an alert and leave the question of automated enforcement to future work or to a programmable data plane that few real networks operate. This paper presents an access-control architecture that closes that loop using only standard, already-deployed protocols. Devices authenticate via IEEE 802.1X with EAP-TLS, and a RADIUS server acts as a continuous policy decision point capable of evicting an active session via a Change-of-Authorization Disconnect-Request and permanently excluding a device through certificate revocation. A central, contextual access policy engine continuously consumes the anomaly detector's output and actuates this response over a narrowly restricted channel to the RADIUS server; the same engine is designed to be extensible to other access types, though this paper evaluates only the network access-control mechanism. This mechanism is driven by an anomaly signal from a one-class detector adapted from a prior MUD/SDN-based design, replacing its per-flow multi-model pipeline with passive traffic capture and a single fused model that combines a cluster-based, a volumetric, and a protocol-signature score. On a single testbed device, the detector reaches an AUC of 0.9964 and detects all 24 evaluated attack scenarios (eight attack types at three intensities) using roughly 43$\times$ less training data than the reference design, and the resulting alerts reliably trigger the automated disconnect-then-revoke response, which we measure to evict a device from the network in 335.8\,ms on average and complete certificate revocation in a further 111.5\,ms. We report this evaluation as a demonstration of the closed-loop architecture rather than of the detector itself, and discuss multi-device generalization as a concrete next step.
tldr: 该论文提出了一种基于异常检测的自动网络撤销访问控制架构，利用IEEE 802.1X和RADIUS实现物联网设备的自动断开和证书撤销，检测器AUC达0.9964，平均断开时间335.8ms。
abstract_cn: 基于网络的物联网设备异常检测技术已发展至可报告较高检测精度的阶段，但大多数已发表的系统仅止步于发出警报，将自动执行的问题留待未来工作或交由实际网络中极少部署的可编程数据平面处理。本文提出一种仅使用标准且已部署协议的访问控制架构，以闭合该控制回路。设备通过IEEE 802.1X与EAP-TLS进行身份认证，RADIUS服务器作为持续策略决策点，能够通过授权变更断开请求（Change-of-Authorization Disconnect-Request）驱逐活跃会话，并通过证书撤销永久排除设备。一个中央上下文感知策略引擎持续接收异常检测器的输出，并通过一条严格受限的通道向RADIUS服务器触发该响应；该引擎设计为可扩展至其他访问类型，但本文仅评估网络访问控制机制。该机制由源自先前基于MUD/SDN设计的单类检测器所生成的异常信号驱动，该检测器用被动流量捕获和单一融合模型替代了原方案中基于每流的多模型流水线，该融合模型结合了基于聚类、基于流量规模及基于协议签名的评分。在单一测试床设备上，该检测器达到0.9964的AUC，并使用比参考设计少约43倍的训练数据检测了全部24种评估攻击场景（8种攻击类型，每种3种强度），由此产生的警报可靠地触发了自动断开连接后撤销证书的响应。我们测得该响应平均在335.8毫秒内将设备从网络中驱逐，并在额外111.5毫秒内完成证书撤销。本评估旨在展示该闭环架构而非检测器本身，并将多设备泛化作为具体的下一步工作进行讨论。

reasons: 接近喜欢过的《MLLMRec: A Preference Reasoning Paradigm w》
偏好主题：capture、systems

title: Xiaomi-Robotics-U0: Unified Embodied Synthesis with World Foundation Model
abstract: Recent foundation image and video generation models offer strong generalization and controllability, but their direct application to embodied scenarios is limited by requirements for multi-view consistency, geometric coherence, and robot embodiment constraints. Existing methods typically adapt foundation models with limited robot data, often sacrificing visual knowledge acquired during large-scale pre-training. We present Xiaomi-Robotics-U0, a 38-billion-parameter multimodal autoregressive model for unified embodied synthesis. It treats embodied generation as an extension of foundation image and video generation and jointly optimizes text-to-image generation, image editing, embodied scene generation, embodied transfer, and embodied video generation. This unified framework preserves the generalization of the pre-trained world foundation model while adapting it to embodied settings. Xiaomi-Robotics-U0 is the first model to support high-quality multi-view scene generation across multiple robot embodiments and to introduce structured, controllable embodied transfer for fine-grained editing while preserving multi-view consistency and interaction dynamics. It achieves state-of-the-art results on single-step and sequential generation tasks, outperforming GPT-Image-2.0 in human evaluations of embodied scene generation and transfer, ranking first on World Arena for embodied video generation, and improving the out-of-distribution success rate of pi_0.5 from 36.9% to 63.2% on challenging real-world manipulation tasks. These results show that foundation world models can serve both as embodied world models and scalable data engines for embodied intelligence. Code and checkpoints are available at https://robotics.xiaomi.com/xiaomi-robotics-u0.html.
tldr: 该论文提出了一个380亿参数的多模态自回归模型Xiaomi-Robotics-U0，用于统一具身合成，在机器人场景生成和转移任务上达到SOTA，但与推荐系统无关。
abstract_cn: 近期的基础图像与视频生成模型展现出强大的泛化能力与可控性，但其在具身场景中的直接应用受到多视角一致性、几何连贯性及机器人具身约束等要求的限制。现有方法通常利用有限的机器人数据对基础模型进行适配，往往牺牲了大规模预训练过程中获得的视觉知识。我们提出小米机器人-U0（Xiaomi-Robotics-U0），一个拥有380亿参数的多模态自回归模型，用于统一具身合成。它将具身生成视为基础图像与视频生成的扩展，并联合优化文本到图像生成、图像编辑、具身场景生成、具身迁移及具身视频生成。这一统一框架保留了预训练世界基础模型的泛化能力，同时使其适应具身环境。小米机器人-U0是首个支持跨多种机器人具身的高质量多视角场景生成模型，并引入了结构化、可控的具身迁移，在保持多视角一致性与交互动态的同时实现细粒度编辑。它在单步与序列生成任务上取得了最先进的结果，在具身场景生成与迁移的人类评估中优于GPT-Image-2.0，在具身视频生成的World Arena排行榜上位列第一，并在具有挑战性的真实世界操作任务中将pi_0.5的分布外成功率从36.9%提升至63.2%。这些结果表明，基础世界模型既可作为具身世界模型，也可作为具身智能的可扩展数据引擎。代码与检查点可在https://robotics.xiaomi.com/xiaomi-robotics-u0.html获取。

title: Extending LLM Context via Associative Recurrent Memory
abstract: Extending the context length of large language models (LLMs) is critical for many real-world applications, yet standard transformers remain constrained by quadratic compute and linear memory scaling. In this work, we investigate the Associative Recurrent Memory Transformer (ARMT) as a practical approach for enabling long-context processing in LLMs, constant memory scaling, and better efficiency. We make three main contributions. First, we construct two domain-specific long-context datasets designed to evaluate realistic workloads, focusing on narrow-domain fine-tuning scenarios. Second, we propose a comprehensive training recipe for ARMT-based context extension, combining continued pre-training, synthetic long-context data generation, curriculum learning, and selective integration of associative memory into chosen model layers. Third, we present an extensive experimental study demonstrating that ARMT-augmented models: (i) process inputs well beyond their original context limits without degrading performance relative to in-limit baselines; (ii) generalize more effectively to out-of-distribution context lengths; and (iii) need 30% less FLOPs while preserving baseline performance within the original context window.
tldr: 该论文提出关联循环记忆变换器（ARMT）以扩展LLM的上下文处理能力，实现常数级内存缩放和30%的FLOPs减少，同时保持基线性能。
abstract_cn: 扩展大语言模型（LLMs）的上下文长度对许多实际应用至关重要，但标准Transformer仍受限于二次方计算复杂度和线性内存扩展。在本工作中，我们研究了关联递归记忆Transformer（ARMT），将其作为一种实用方法，用于实现LLM中的长上下文处理、恒定内存扩展以及更高效率。我们做出三项主要贡献。首先，我们构建了两个领域特定的长上下文数据集，旨在评估实际工作负载，重点关注窄领域微调场景。其次，我们提出了一套基于ARMT的上下文扩展综合训练方案，结合了持续预训练、合成长上下文数据生成、课程学习以及将关联记忆选择性集成到特定模型层中。第三，我们通过广泛的实验研究表明，经ARMT增强的模型：（i）能够处理远超其原始上下文限制的输入，且性能相对于限制内的基线模型未出现下降；（ii）能更有效地泛化至分布外的上下文长度；（iii）在原始上下文窗口内保持基线性能的同时，可减少30%的浮点运算次数（FLOPs）。

reasons: 接近喜欢过的《Enhancing Sequential Recommender with Larg》
偏好主题：transformer、language

title: Interaction Scaling: Grounding the Third Axis of Test-Time Compute
abstract:
There are two standard ways to spend more compute at test time: let a model reason longer, or sample more attempts and keep one. Both share a hidden limit: they are internal. Every extra token comes from the same frozen weights and the same prompt, so neither can tell the model anything it does not already know. We study a third way, interaction: the model proposes an artifact, an external instrument observes how it actually behaves, and the model revises. Each cycle imports a real observation, so interaction breaks through the ceiling the other two hit.
  We argue that a single variable governs this third axis, grounding, and that it must hold on both sides of the loop. The feedback that drives revision must come from an instrument that actually observes the flaw, and so must the metric that scores the result. On hard coding tasks at a fixed token budget, reasoning-only and best-of-N sampling both plateau (the latter even when an oracle picks the best sample), while every interaction strategy keeps improving; our proposer-reviewer harness reaches a perfect 100% pass rate with no run-to-run variance, and the gain holds across three model families. On rendered visual artifacts, the usual judge (a vision-language model, or VLM, reading a screenshot) rates 14 of 15 visibly broken figures "perfect," because the screenshot hides the flaws before the judge can see them. A tool that measures the real layout instead shows the loop removing 40-74% of defects across four modalities; and that same VLM, used as the reviewer, makes slide layouts worse where the measuring tool repairs them. Interaction scaling is real and distinct from reasoning and sampling, but only visible when both the feedback and the metric are grounded.
tldr: 该论文提出交互缩放作为测试时计算的第三轴，通过外部工具提供真实反馈来突破推理和采样方法的性能上限，在编程和视觉任务上验证了有效性。
abstract_cn:
在测试时增加计算量有两种标准方法：让模型推理更长时间，或者采样更多尝试并保留其中一个。这两种方法共享一个隐藏的局限：它们都是内部的。每一个额外的词元都来自相同的冻结权重和相同的提示，因此两者都无法告诉模型任何它尚未知晓的信息。我们研究了第三种方法，即交互：模型提出一个产物，外部工具观察其实际表现，然后模型进行修正。每一轮循环都引入一个真实的观察，因此交互突破了另外两种方法所遭遇的天花板。

我们认为，一个单一的变量支配着这第三个轴，即“具身性”（grounding），并且它必须在循环的两侧都成立。驱动修正的反馈必须来自一个实际观察缺陷的工具，而评估结果的指标也必须如此。在固定词元预算的困难编码任务上，仅推理和最佳N采样（best-of-N sampling）均出现平台期（后者即使由预言机选择最佳样本也是如此），而每一种交互策略都在持续改进；我们提出的“提案者-评审者”框架达到了完美的100%通过率，且无运行间方差，这一增益在三个模型家族中均成立。在渲染的视觉产物上，通常的评判者（一个读取截图的视觉语言模型，即VLM）将15个明显损坏的图形中的14个评为“完美”，因为截图在评判者看到缺陷之前就将其隐藏了。而一个测量真实布局的工具则显示，该循环在四种模态下消除了40-74%的缺陷；同样的VLM，当被用作评审者时，却使幻灯片布局变得更糟，而测量工具则修复了它们。交互缩放是真实存在的，且不同于推理和采样，但只有当反馈和指标都具身化时，它才显现出来。

reasons: 接近喜欢过的《MLLMRec: A Preference Reasoning Paradigm w》

title: MAGIC: Transition-Aware Generation of Navigable Multi-Scene Game Worlds with Large Language Models
abstract: Multi-scene navigation (clearing an objective in one bounded space and then crossing a portal into the next) is a defining feature of contemporary 3D games, but authoring it is laborious: every portal must have consistent endpoints on both sides, each interior must remain navigable once it is furnished, and the resulting connectivity must be kept consistent across many files. Recent large language model (LLM) and multimodal LLM (MLLM) scene generators have made single-interior synthesis dramatically cheaper, yet they produce one scene at a time and cannot, by naive repetition, yield a connected multi-scene world. We identify three obstacles that single-scene methods leave unsolved: cross-scene consistency, in-scene navigability, and the evaluation of whether a transition actually works. We present MAGIC, a prompt-to-project system that addresses all three. MAGIC is a four-stage pipeline that turns a single natural-language prompt into a runnable multi-scene game project: it plans a shared transition-aware intermediate representation, specifies each scene while enforcing portal reachability with a flood-fill validator, generates the scenes together with their transition scripts, and combines them into one project. Because existing single-scene fidelity metrics never execute a transition, we further introduce a transition-focused evaluation agent that runs each transition in play. On a new benchmark of 100 multi-scene cases, MAGIC produces an executable project for every case and reaches 0.99 precision, 0.95 recall, and 0.96 F1 on end-to-end transition identification; stage by stage, it recovers more ground-truth portals and yields markedly more navigable layouts than an LLM baseline and Holodeck. Our code is available at https://github.com/sereneee1201/MAGIC/.
tldr: 该论文提出了MAGIC系统，利用大语言模型从自然语言提示生成可导航的多场景游戏世界，解决了跨场景一致性、场景内可导航性和过渡评估问题。
abstract_cn: 多场景导航（在一个有界空间内完成目标，然后通过传送门进入下一个空间）是当代3D游戏的一个标志性特征，但其制作过程十分繁琐：每个传送门两侧必须具有一致的端点，每个内部空间在布置完成后必须保持可导航性，并且最终形成的连通性必须在多个文件中保持一致。近年来，基于大语言模型（LLM）和多模态大语言模型（MLLM）的场景生成器已大幅降低了单一室内场景合成的成本，但它们一次只能生成一个场景，并且无法通过简单的重复来生成一个连通的多场景世界。我们识别出单场景方法未能解决的三个障碍：跨场景一致性、场景内可导航性，以及判断过渡是否实际有效的评估方法。我们提出了MAGIC，一个从提示词到项目的系统，解决了上述所有问题。MAGIC是一个四阶段流水线，可将单一自然语言提示词转化为一个可运行的多场景游戏项目：它规划一个共享的、感知过渡的中间表示，在指定每个场景的同时通过泛洪填充验证器确保传送门的可达性，生成场景及其过渡脚本，并将它们组合成一个项目。由于现有的单场景保真度指标从未执行过过渡过程，我们进一步引入了一个以过渡为中心的评估智能体，该智能体在游戏运行中执行每个过渡。在一个包含100个多场景案例的新基准测试中，MAGIC为每个案例生成了可执行项目，并在端到端过渡识别上达到了0.99的精确率、0.95的召回率和0.96的F1分数；逐阶段来看，与LLM基线方法和Holodeck相比，它恢复了更多真实传送门，并生成了明显更可导航的布局。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/sereneee1201/MAGIC/ 获取。

reasons: 接近喜欢过的《MLLMRec: A Preference Reasoning Paradigm w》
偏好主题：language、recall

title: HCRMap: Pressure-Aware Hot-Expert Residency Mapping for 3.5D MoE Chiplet Inference
abstract:
Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) large language models (LLM) activate only a small number of experts during inference, but token routing introduces persistent expert hotness skew: a small set of hot experts continuously receives most tokens, while the remaining experts are lightly loaded. On 3.5D multi-chiplet systems, this skew not only causes compute imbalance but also amplifies pressure on communication, memory bandwidth, I/O, and execution queues. Therefore, the core problem is not simply to reduce token movement, but to dynamically place and reuse hot expert replicas across different memory tiers.
  This paper proposes HCRMap, a hot expert residency mapping framework for pressure-aware expert replica management in 3.5D MoE inference. Based on expert hotness, weight loading cost, migration overhead, and runtime resource pressure, HCRMap dynamically determines which experts should be promoted, retained, demoted, or evicted. It then maps routed token groups to suitable resident replicas, thereby jointly mitigating communication, memory, and queue bottlenecks.
  Experimental results show that HCRMap reduces end-to-end latency by 43.6% and 43.0% over Hydra in the prefill and decode stages, respectively; by 34.5% and 33.1% over MoEntwine; and by 46.7% and 46.0% over PIMoE.
tldr: 该论文提出HCRMap框架，通过压力感知的热专家驻留映射，在3.5D MoE芯片推理中减少延迟，但研究内容与推荐系统无关。
abstract_cn:
混合专家（Mixture-of-Experts, MoE）大语言模型（large language model, LLM）在推理过程中仅激活少量专家，但令牌路由会引发持续的专家热度倾斜：少数热门专家持续接收大部分令牌，而其余专家负载较轻。在3.5D多芯粒系统上，这种倾斜不仅导致计算不均衡，还会加剧通信、内存带宽、输入/输出（I/O）及执行队列的压力。因此，核心问题并非简单减少令牌移动，而是要在不同内存层级间动态放置并复用热门专家副本。

本文提出HCRMap——一种面向3.5D MoE推理中压力感知型专家副本管理的热门专家驻留映射框架。基于专家热度、权重加载成本、迁移开销及运行时资源压力，HCRMap动态决定哪些专家应被提升、保留、降级或驱逐，随后将路由后的令牌组映射至合适的驻留副本，从而协同缓解通信、内存及队列瓶颈。

实验结果表明，在预填充（prefill）和解码（decode）阶段，HCRMap相较于Hydra分别将端到端延迟降低43.6%和43.0%；相较于MoEntwine分别降低34.5%和33.1%；相较于PIMoE分别降低46.7%和46.0%。

title: Technical Report on the CVPR 2026@AdvML Workshop Challenge
abstract: Vision-language agents (VLAs) are increasingly used to interpret complex driving scenes and support safety-critical reasoning. This report presents the CVPR 2026@AdvML Workshop Challenge on adversarial multimodal attacks against autonomous-driving VLAs. Built on DriveLM-style multi-view visual question answering, the challenge represents each scene with six synchronized camera images and a structured collection of driving-related question-answer pairs. Participants generate adversarial images and suffix-only textual perturbations that induce model responses to deviate from reference answers while preserving image fidelity and limiting textual cost. The competition comprises two phases, with Phase II adding a hidden black-box model to assess transferability. We describe the task design, submission rules, evaluation protocol, and leaderboard results, and then examine five leading submissions for which technical reports were available. Across these reports, several recurring patterns emerge: image-side attacks are favored by the suffix penalty; scene-level, multi-view optimization is more effective than treating views in isolation; QA types and graph structure provide useful priors for allocating attack budget; feature-space objectives can improve black-box transfer; and typographic content embedded in camera images exposes a persistent vulnerability in driving VLAs. These findings provide a practical reference for future robustness evaluation and defense design in multimodal autonomous-driving systems.
tldr: 该技术报告介绍了CVPR 2026@AdvML Workshop挑战赛，针对自动驾驶视觉语言模型设计对抗性多模态攻击，通过生成对抗图像和文本扰动使模型输出偏离参考答案，并总结了参赛方案的常见模式。
abstract_cn: 视觉-语言智能体（Vision-language agents, VLAs）正越来越多地被用于解读复杂驾驶场景并支持安全关键推理。本报告介绍了CVPR 2026@AdvML Workshop中针对自动驾驶VLA的对抗性多模态攻击挑战赛。该挑战基于DriveLM风格的多视角视觉问答，每个场景由六张同步相机图像及一组结构化的驾驶相关问答对构成。参赛者需生成对抗性图像及仅后缀形式的文本扰动，使模型响应偏离参考答案，同时保持图像保真度并限制文本成本。竞赛分为两个阶段，第二阶段引入隐藏的黑盒模型以评估迁移性。我们描述了任务设计、提交规则、评估协议及排行榜结果，并分析了五份有技术报告可查的优胜方案。在这些报告中，若干共性模式浮现：图像侧攻击因后缀惩罚而更受青睐；场景级多视角优化优于独立处理各视角；问答类型与图结构为攻击预算分配提供了有效先验；特征空间目标可提升黑盒迁移性；嵌入相机图像中的印刷文本内容暴露了驾驶VLA的持续脆弱性。这些发现为多模态自动驾驶系统的未来鲁棒性评估与防御设计提供了实用参考。

reasons: 接近喜欢过的《MLLMRec: A Preference Reasoning Paradigm w》
偏好主题：zheng、systems、liu

title: Vinci2: Providing Proactive Assistance in Continuous Egocentric Videos
abstract: When should an intelligent assistant speak up without being asked? Continuous egocentric video offers rich, evolving context that enables a new form of assistance: one that is proactive rather than merely reactive. Yet existing approaches either wait passively for user queries or treat every detected event as requiring a response, without considering the user's history, current activity, or whether assistance would actually be welcome. We reframe proactive assistance as a context-dependent decision problem: the agent must not only perceive what is happening, but reason over accumulated temporal context to determine when and whether to intervene. To this end, we present Vinci2, a proactive egocentric assistance system that advances the on-device assistant Vinci from reactive response toward proactivity. On the evaluation side, we present EgoServe, the first large-scale benchmark for proactive assistance in continuous egocentric video. EgoServe comprises over 3,000 service instances organized along 4 temporal memory horizons, ranging from immediate safety alerts to long-term habit coaching, across 10 service categories. On the modeling side, we propose EgoMemo, a training-free, memory-augmented agent that maintains three complementary memory representations: multi-scale temporal summaries, a semantic knowledge graph, and visual embedding archives. At each timestep, EgoMemo performs retrieval-augmented reasoning to determine whether assistance is warranted and, if so, produces contextually grounded responses. Experiments demonstrate that EgoMemo establishes strong baselines on EgoServe while remaining competitive on existing egocentric benchmarks. Our benchmark and code are publicly available at \href{https://sitonggong.github.io/EgoServe-page/}{Vinci2}.
tldr: 该论文提出了Vinci2，一个在连续自我中心视频中提供主动辅助的系统，通过记忆增强代理EgoMemo和基准EgoServe，实现了基于时间上下文的主动干预决策。
abstract_cn: 智能助手何时应在未被请求时主动发声？连续的第一人称视角视频提供了丰富且不断演化的上下文，使得一种新型辅助成为可能：这种辅助是主动的，而不仅仅是被动的。然而，现有方法要么被动等待用户查询，要么将每个检测到的事件都视为需要响应，而未考虑用户的历史记录、当前活动，或者辅助是否真的受欢迎。我们将主动辅助重新定义为一个依赖上下文的决策问题：智能体不仅需要感知正在发生的事情，还需要基于累积的时间上下文进行推理，以确定何时以及是否应当介入。为此，我们提出了Vinci2，一个主动的第一人称辅助系统，它将设备端助手Vinci从被动响应推向主动服务。在评估方面，我们提出了EgoServe，这是首个面向连续第一人称视频中主动辅助的大规模基准测试。EgoServe包含超过3000个服务实例，按照4个时间记忆跨度（temporal memory horizons）组织，涵盖从即时安全警报到长期习惯指导的10个服务类别。在建模方面，我们提出了EgoMemo，一种无需训练、基于记忆增强的智能体，它维护三种互补的记忆表示：多尺度时间摘要、语义知识图谱和视觉嵌入档案。在每个时间步，EgoMemo执行检索增强推理，以判断是否需要提供辅助，并在需要时生成基于上下文的响应。实验表明，EgoMemo在EgoServe上建立了强基线，同时在现有的第一人称基准测试中保持了竞争力。我们的基准测试和代码已在\href{https://sitonggong.github.io/EgoServe-page/}{Vinci2}公开提供。

title: Toward Inclusive Avatar Design with Limb Differences Through Artificial Intelligence
abstract: As extended reality becomes more popular for social interaction and entertainment, 3D avatars must represent the full diversity of body types. Most 3D avatar systems only support normative bodies and do not accurately depict people with limb differences, amputations, or other morphological variations. This paper reviews emerging technical approaches for inclusive 3D avatar customization for this group and current guidelines that promote respectful and accurate representation. We highlight persistent challenges, including the scarcity of diverse datasets and the limitations in animation for non-normative anatomies. This paper positions artificial intelligence as a promising path to overcoming these limitations and advancing inclusive 3D avatar generation.
tldr: 该论文综述了通过人工智能实现包容性3D虚拟形象定制的方法，以解决肢体差异人群在虚拟现实中的代表性不足问题。
abstract_cn: 随着扩展现实（Extended Reality）在社交互动与娱乐领域的日益普及，三维虚拟形象（3D Avatar）必须充分体现身体类型的多样性。当前大多数三维虚拟形象系统仅支持标准体型，无法准确呈现肢体差异、截肢者或其他形态变异人群的特征。本文综述了针对该群体实现包容性三维虚拟形象定制的新兴技术方法，以及当前倡导尊重且准确呈现的指导原则。我们着重指出了持续存在的挑战，包括多样化数据集的匮乏以及非标准解剖结构动画制作的局限性。本文将人工智能定位为克服这些局限、推动包容性三维虚拟形象生成的可行路径。

reasons: 偏好主题：systems

title: Comparative Analysis of GAT and BERT for Human-Like Playtesting
abstract: Accurately modeling and understanding player experience is crucial for designing engaging puzzle games. To achieve this, a common approach involves collecting diverse user data to train predictive playtesting models that mimic player behavior. However, existing data-driven methods often lack the ability to capture the full range of player strategies and require extensive feature engineering and network architecture modeling. This limitation becomes particularly evident when new game mechanics or features are introduced, which necessitate continual adjustments to the models. To addrss these challenges, we propose a more generalized representation that reduces - or even eliminates - the need for ongoing feature-engineering maintenance. Specifically, we investigate two general-purpose network architectures: (a) a transformer-based model (BERT) and (b) a graph attention model (GAT), both of which are designed to effectively capture the relational structure of Candy Crush Saga (CCS) game boards. Our experiments compare these approaches to Convolutional Neural Networks (CNN) baselines, revealing better performance on challenging board configurations and underscoring the benefits of our generalizable representation.
tldr: 论文比较了GAT和BERT在模拟玩家行为方面的性能，发现它们优于CNN，能够更好地泛化到新游戏关卡。
abstract_cn: 准确建模和理解玩家体验对于设计引人入胜的解谜游戏至关重要。为实现这一目标，一种常见方法是收集多样化的用户数据，以训练能够模拟玩家行为的预测性游戏测试模型。然而，现有的数据驱动方法往往难以捕捉玩家策略的全貌，且需要大量的特征工程和网络架构建模。当引入新的游戏机制或功能时，这一局限性尤为明显，因为模型需要不断进行调整。为应对这些挑战，我们提出了一种更具通用性的表示方法，以减少甚至消除持续进行特征工程维护的需求。具体而言，我们研究了两种通用网络架构：(a) 基于Transformer的模型（BERT）和(b) 图注意力模型（GAT），两者均旨在有效捕捉《糖果粉碎传奇》（Candy Crush Saga, CCS）游戏棋盘的关系结构。我们的实验将这些方法与卷积神经网络（Convolutional Neural Networks, CNN）基线进行了比较，结果显示，在具有挑战性的棋盘配置上，我们的方法表现更优，这突显了通用表示方法的优势。

title: See like a Robot: Robot-Centric Pointmaps for Vision-Language-Action Models
abstract: Vision-language-action (VLA) models predict robot actions from visual observations and language instructions. These actions are defined in the robot's own 3D coordinate frame, yet most VLAs observe the scene in the camera frame, creating a frame mismatch between where the scene is observed and where actions are defined. The mismatch is benign under a fixed viewpoint, where the policy can memorize a single observation-to-action mapping, but grows harder as large-scale datasets aggregate demonstrations across diverse camera setups and the policy must generalize this mapping across viewpoints. We address this mismatch with robot-centric pointmaps, images whose pixels store the 3D coordinates of scene points in the robot frame. Pointmaps provide robot-frame 3D geometry while preserving the dense H x W grid expected by pretrained 2D VLAs, so they integrate into existing VLAs with minimal architectural change. On RoboCasa, pointmaps improve both pi0.5 and SmolVLA and outperform representative camera-viewpoint and 3D-aware baselines. In real-robot experiments, their advantage over an RGB-only policy widens when the camera is moved to a placement unseen during training.
tldr: 该论文提出机器人中心点图方法，解决视觉-语言-动作模型中相机视角与机器人坐标系不匹配的问题，在RoboCasa和真实机器人实验中提升了策略泛化能力。
abstract_cn: 视觉-语言-动作（Vision-language-action, VLA）模型根据视觉观测和语言指令预测机器人的动作。这些动作在机器人自身的3D坐标系中定义，然而大多数VLA模型在相机坐标系中观测场景，这导致了场景观测与动作定义之间的坐标系不匹配。在固定视角下，这种不匹配影响较小，因为策略可以记忆单一的观测到动作的映射关系；但随着大规模数据集聚合来自不同相机设置的演示数据，且策略需要跨视角泛化该映射关系时，这种不匹配的难度随之增大。我们通过以机器人为中心的点图（robot-centric pointmaps）来解决这一不匹配问题——这是一种像素存储场景点在机器人坐标系中3D坐标的图像。点图在提供机器人坐标系下的3D几何信息的同时，保留了预训练2D VLA模型所期望的密集H×W网格结构，因此能以最小的架构改动集成到现有VLA模型中。在RoboCasa数据集上，点图同时提升了pi0.5和SmolVLA的性能，并优于具有代表性的相机视角基线和3D感知基线。在真实机器人实验中，当相机被移动到训练中未出现的位置时，点图相较于仅使用RGB的策略展现出更显著的优势。

title: Enhancing Query Efficiency for d-DNNF Representations Through Preprocessing
abstract: In this paper, we investigate preprocessing techniques aimed at improving the efficiency of accessing models of propositional formulas represented in conjunctive normal form (CNF). We focus on three fundamental tasks: uniform sampling, direct model access, and model enumeration. Our analysis reveals that most state-of-the-art preprocessors, when they do not preserve formula equivalence, are generally unsuitable for these tasks. In contrast, we demonstrate that preprocessors which preserve model counts can be effectively leveraged, provided relevant preprocessing information is maintained. To validate our approach, we perform extensive experiments on a diverse suite of benchmarks from multiple domains. The experimental results show that our preprocessing methods are both efficient and robust, yielding significant performance improvements for model access queries when CNF formulas are compiled into d-DNNF representations.
tldr: 该论文研究通过预处理技术提升d-DNNF表示的查询效率，实验表明保留模型计数的预处理器能显著提高模型访问性能。
abstract_cn: 本文研究了旨在提升合取范式（CNF）命题公式模型访问效率的预处理技术。我们聚焦于三个基本任务：均匀采样、直接模型访问以及模型枚举。分析表明，大多数最先进的预处理器在无法保持公式等价性时，通常不适用于这些任务。相比之下，我们证明，只要保留相关的预处理信息，那些能够保持模型计数的预处理器可以被有效利用。为验证我们的方法，我们在来自多个领域的多样化基准测试集上进行了大量实验。实验结果表明，我们的预处理方法既高效又稳健，当CNF公式被编译为d-DNNF表示时，这些方法能显著提升模型访问查询的性能。

title: LightMem-Ego: Your AI Memory for Everyday Life
abstract: Personal AI assistants on mobile and wearable devices continuously perceive users' daily lives through visual and audio streams. However, answering queries about past experiences requires lightweight multimodal memory that can continuously accumulate, organize, and retrieve long-term experiences, which remains challenging. To address this challenge, we present LightMem-Ego, a lightweight streaming multimodal memory system for everyday-life assistance. The system continuously captures egocentric visual and audio streams, aligns them on a shared timeline, and organizes them into a hierarchical memory consisting of current, short-term, and long-term memory. Given a user query, LightMem-Ego dynamically routes retrieval to the appropriate memory level and generates answers grounded in multimodal evidence. The demonstration can be deployed on smartphones and AI glasses, supporting object finding, conversation recall, life summarization, routine discovery, and personalized assistance. Code is available at https://github.com/zjunlp/LightMem-Ego.
tldr: 论文提出LightMem-Ego，一个轻量级流式多模态记忆系统，用于在移动和可穿戴设备上持续积累、组织和检索日常生活中的多模态体验，以回答关于过去经历的问题。
abstract_cn: 在移动与可穿戴设备上运行的个人AI助手通过视觉和音频流持续感知用户的日常生活。然而，回答关于过往经历的查询需要能够持续积累、组织并检索长期经验的轻量级多模态记忆，这仍然是一项挑战。为应对这一挑战，我们提出了LightMem-Ego，一种用于日常生活辅助的轻量级流式多模态记忆系统。该系统持续捕获以自我为中心的视觉与音频流，将其对齐至统一时间线，并组织为由当前记忆、短期记忆与长期记忆构成的层级化记忆结构。面对用户查询时，LightMem-Ego能够动态地将检索路由至合适的记忆层级，并基于多模态证据生成答案。该演示系统可部署于智能手机与AI眼镜上，支持物品寻找、对话回忆、生活总结、日常规律发现及个性化辅助等功能。代码已开源至https://github.com/zjunlp/LightMem-Ego。

title: A Multimodal Dataset for Large Language Model Applications in the Energy Domain
abstract: This paper presents the mAIEnergy dataset, an open-access, multimodal corpus developed to support Large Language Model (LLM) applications in the energy sector. The dataset integrates approximately 50,000 textual documents, 20,000 images, 25 million numerical time series records, and 2 million geospatial and relational data entries. It includes policy and regulatory texts, scientific articles and news articles, satellite and contextual imagery, electricity system measurements, weather observations, statistical indicators, and geospatial representations of energy infrastructure and related entities. All data have been harmonized into structured, ready-to-use formats, accompanied by consistent metadata and reproducible data retrieval and preparation workflows. The dataset can serve as a foundational energy knowledge base, allowing energy stakeholders to integrate additional open-source or proprietary data. The mAIEnergy dataset adheres to Findable, Accessible, Interoperable, and Reusable (FAIR) principles, enhancing its applicability for AI-driven energy research, modeling, and decision-making.
tldr: 该论文构建了一个面向能源领域的多模态数据集mAIEnergy，整合文本、图像、时间序列和地理空间数据，以支持大语言模型在能源领域的应用。
abstract_cn: 本文介绍了mAIEnergy数据集，这是一个开放获取的多模态语料库，旨在支持大型语言模型（LLM）在能源领域的应用。该数据集整合了约5万份文本文件、2万张图像、2500万条数值时间序列记录以及200万条地理空间与关系数据条目。其内容包括政策与监管文本、科学论文与新闻报道、卫星图像与情境图像、电力系统测量数据、气象观测数据、统计指标，以及能源基础设施及相关实体的地理空间表征。所有数据均已统一为结构化、可直接使用的格式，并配有统一的元数据以及可复现的数据检索与准备工作流程。该数据集可作为基础能源知识库，使能源相关利益方能够整合其他开源或专有数据。mAIEnergy数据集遵循可查找、可访问、可互操作、可重用（FAIR）原则，从而增强了其在人工智能驱动的能源研究、建模与决策中的适用性。

title: The Ebb and Flow of Multimodal Focus: Scheduling Visual Relay Windows for Grounded VLM Reasoning
abstract: Vision-language models increasingly succeed on multimodal reasoning benchmarks, yet their visual evidence often becomes unstable once it enters the language stack, weakening evidence-grounded reasoning. To understand this fragility, we examine the internal dynamics of VLMs through a mechanistic lens and uncover a stable three-stage redistribution of multimodal attention focus across depth: an early question-conditioned organization, a critical middle visual-dominant relay, and a late return to answer formation. We operationalize the middle phase as the Visual Relay Window (VRW), and show that its geometry varies with task demand, is causally tied to grounded generation, and distinguishes unsupported answers from stronger reasoning trajectories. Guided by this internal rhythm, we propose TRACE, a task-adaptive inference-time control framework with lightweight trained modules. It reshapes relay allocation during prefill and preserves assembled visual support after handoff during decoding. Across four open-weight VLM backbones and seven benchmarks, TRACE delivers large gains on grounding-sensitive settings, improving them by 4.33 points on average and by up to 6.6 points, while also improving reasoning-heavy tasks. These results show that explicitly controlling multimodal focus across depth offers a unified and effective mechanism for strengthening evidence-grounded multimodal reasoning.
tldr: 论文通过机制分析发现VLM中多模态注意力聚焦的三阶段动态，提出任务自适应推理控制框架TRACE，通过控制视觉中继窗口提升证据基础的多模态推理能力。
abstract_cn: 视觉-语言模型在多模态推理基准测试中日益取得成功，然而一旦视觉证据进入语言处理栈，其稳定性往往会下降，从而削弱基于证据的推理能力。为理解这一脆弱性，我们通过机制性视角审视视觉-语言模型的内部动态，并揭示出跨深度层次上多模态注意力焦点的稳定三阶段再分配过程：早期的问题条件化组织阶段、关键的中期视觉主导中继阶段，以及后期回归答案形成阶段。我们将中期阶段操作化为视觉中继窗口（Visual Relay Window, VRW），并证明其几何结构随任务需求变化，与基于证据的生成存在因果关联，并能区分缺乏支持的答案与更强的推理轨迹。受这一内部节奏的启发，我们提出了TRACE——一种任务自适应的推理时控制框架，配备轻量级训练模块。该框架在预填充阶段重塑中继分配，并在解码阶段的交接后保留已组装的视觉支持信息。在四个开源权重视觉-语言模型骨干网络和七个基准测试上，TRACE在依赖证据的敏感场景中取得了显著提升，平均提高4.33个百分点，最高达6.6个百分点，同时也在推理密集型任务上有所改进。这些结果表明，显式控制跨深度层次的多模态焦点，为强化基于证据的多模态推理提供了一种统一且有效的机制。

title: Omni-Decision: A Progressive Evidence-State Agent System for Omni-Modal QA
abstract: Omni-modal evidence-seeking QA requires agents to answer questions whose evidence is sparsely distributed across videos, audio, images, web pages, and computation results. Existing agentic multimodal systems often leave evidence in scratchpads, tool trajectories, or free-form histories, making it difficult to track what has been grounded, what remains missing, and when the evidence is sufficient to answer. We propose Omni-Decision, a training-free evidence-state system that turns omni-modal QA into a query-scoped evidence-closure process. For each query, Omni-Decision maintains a structured evidence state containing confirmed evidence, unresolved conflicts, fact and computation dependencies, and open evidence needs. A shared state view conditions planning, evidence acquisition, validation, repair, and finalization. Heterogeneous observations from media, web, computation, and verification modules are normalized, judged, and committed through deterministic state updates. This design enables targeted evidence acquisition, preserves sparse cross-modal cues, and provides inspectable control over repair and stopping. Omni-Decision achieves 45.6% accuracy on OmniGAIA and 58.3% on WorldSense, improving over the baselines by +27.3 and +30.2 percentage points, respectively. No-state ablations and trajectory audits further support the role of explicit evidence-state control in multi-step omni-modal evidence seeking.
tldr: 提出Omni-Decision，一种无需训练的证据状态系统，通过结构化证据状态将全模态问答转化为查询范围的证据闭合过程，在OmniGAIA和WorldSense上分别提升27.3和30.2个百分点。
abstract_cn: 全模态证据搜寻问答要求智能体回答那些证据稀疏分布于视频、音频、图像、网页及计算结果中的问题。现有的智能体多模态系统通常将证据记录于暂存区、工具轨迹或自由形式的历史记录中，这使得追踪哪些证据已被确认、哪些仍缺失、以及何时证据足以回答问题变得困难。我们提出Omni-Decision——一种无需训练的证据状态系统，它将全模态问答转化为一个查询范围内的证据闭合过程。对于每个查询，Omni-Decision维护一个结构化的证据状态，其中包含已确认的证据、未解决的冲突、事实与计算依赖关系，以及待满足的证据需求。共享的状态视图对规划、证据获取、验证、修复及最终确定进行条件约束。来自媒体、网页、计算及验证模块的异构观测结果，通过确定性的状态更新被标准化、评判并提交。该设计能够实现针对性的证据获取，保留稀疏的跨模态线索，并提供对修复与停止的可检查控制。Omni-Decision在OmniGAIA上达到45.6%的准确率，在WorldSense上达到58.3%，分别比基线方法提升了27.3和30.2个百分点。无状态消融实验与轨迹审计进一步支持了显式证据状态控制在多步全模态证据搜寻中的作用。

reasons: 接近喜欢过的《MLLMRec: A Preference Reasoning Paradigm w》
偏好主题：systems

title: Uncertainty Quantification for EO Regression Tasks: Building Height, Tree Canopy Height and Above-ground Biomass Estimation
abstract: Earth Observation regression tasks such as building height, canopy height, and above-ground biomass estimation underpin critical applications in urban planning, forest monitoring, and climate policy, where both accuracy and reliability are critical. Yet most deep learning models yield only deterministic predictions, providing no indication of per-pixel reliability. These regression tasks are inherently challenging due to heterogeneous land surfaces, skewed target distributions, sensor noise, and signal saturation at high target values, making uncertainty (UC) estimation essential for reliable inference. We address this gap by modeling aleatoric uncertainty using year-long Sentinel-1 SAR and Sentinel-2 MSI time series, proposing two complementary approaches: (i) Gaussian UC, which jointly predicts mean and standard deviation under a Gaussian assumption, and (ii) Quantile UC, which estimates the 10th, 50th, and 90th quantiles to capture asymmetric and heteroscedastic error distributions. Both models are evaluated on three representative EO regression tasks at 10 m spatial resolution. Results show that both approaches match or surpass deterministic benchmarks and existing global products, while delivering well-calibrated, interpretable, and operationally useful confidence estimates. Notably, both models outperform the current 10 m state-of-the-art uncertainty-aware model for canopy height estimation. Our implementation will be available at: https://github.com/RituYadav92/EO-Regression-Uncertainty-Estimation
tldr: 该论文提出两种不确定性量化方法（高斯不确定性和分位数不确定性）用于地球观测回归任务，在建筑高度、树冠高度和地上生物量估计上达到或超越现有确定性模型，并提供可靠的置信度估计。
abstract_cn: 地球观测回归任务，例如建筑高度、冠层高度和地上生物量估算，支撑着城市规划、森林监测和气候政策中的关键应用，在这些应用中，准确性和可靠性都至关重要。然而，大多数深度学习模型仅产生确定性预测，无法提供逐像素的可靠性指示。由于地表异质性、目标分布偏斜、传感器噪声以及高目标值下的信号饱和，这些回归任务本身具有挑战性，这使得不确定性估计对于可靠的推断至关重要。我们通过使用长达一年的Sentinel-1 SAR和Sentinel-2 MSI时间序列对偶然不确定性进行建模，提出了两种互补的方法来填补这一空白：(i) 高斯不确定性，它在高斯假设下联合预测均值和标准差；(ii) 分位数不确定性，它估计第10、第50和第90百分位数，以捕捉非对称和异方差误差分布。两种模型均在10米空间分辨率下的三个代表性地球观测回归任务上进行了评估。结果表明，两种方法均达到或超越了确定性基准和现有的全球产品，同时提供了校准良好、可解释且具有操作实用性的置信度估计。值得注意的是，两种模型在冠层高度估算方面均优于当前10米最先进的不确定性感知模型。我们的实现代码将在以下网址提供：https://github.com/RituYadav92/EO-Regression-Uncertainty-Estimation

reasons: 偏好主题：capture

title: Agentic Routing: The Harness-Native Data Flywheel
abstract: Large language model agents are increasingly executed not by a single model call, but by an execution harness that manages observation, context, control, action, state, and verification. At the same time, frontier and open models are becoming structurally specialized: a model that is strong at code editing, long-context recovery, tool use, mathematical reasoning, or low-latency response may not dominate on the other axes. This makes model selection inside an agent a core systems problem rather than a per-query serving trick. Existing routing methods mostly optimize single-turn cost-quality trade-offs and therefore miss the execution state, intermediate failures, and feedback loops that make agents different from chat completion. We propose Harness-Native agentic routing, a step-level routing paradigm that selects either a single best-fit model for cost-effective execution or multiple complementary models for ensemble-style accuracy improvement, conditioned on the full harness state. The key insight is that every routing decision naturally produces a structured data record -- consisting of the query, harness state, model choice or model set, execution trace, outcome, and cost -- whose labels are supplied by the environment rather than by the router itself. These records form a harness-native data flywheel: execution traces train better routers and harness-native models, which improve cost-quality trade-offs and generate more traces under the same budget. We instantiate this idea in OpenSquilla with a four-layer routing stack, an open LightGBM cold-start ranker, and a staged router-model path that turns logged arena records into progressively stronger routing policies. The report studies singleton and multi-model routing on agentic benchmarks including DRACO and PinchBench, and argues that agentic routing is not merely cost control, but a data engine for agent-native training.
tldr: 论文提出了一种基于执行状态的代理路由方法，通过利用执行轨迹构建数据飞轮来优化模型选择，从而提升LLM代理的成本效益和准确性。
abstract_cn: 大语言模型智能体的执行日益不再依赖于单一模型调用，而是通过一个管理观察、上下文、控制、动作、状态与验证的执行框架（execution harness）来完成。与此同时，前沿模型与开源模型在结构上正变得日益专业化：在代码编辑、长上下文恢复、工具使用、数学推理或低延迟响应方面表现优异的模型，未必能在其他维度上同样出色。这使得智能体内部的模型选择成为一个核心系统问题，而不仅仅是每次查询的服务优化技巧。现有的路由方法大多优化单轮成本-质量权衡，因此忽略了执行状态、中间失败以及反馈循环——这些正是智能体与聊天补全（chat completion）之间的本质区别。我们提出“框架原生智能体路由”（Harness-Native agentic routing），这是一种步骤级路由范式，能够根据完整的框架状态，选择单一最优模型以进行成本高效的执行，或选择多个互补模型以提升集成式的准确性。其关键洞察在于：每一次路由决策都会自然生成一条结构化数据记录——包含查询、框架状态、模型选择或模型集合、执行轨迹、结果与成本——其标签由环境提供，而非由路由器自身生成。这些记录形成了一个框架原生的数据飞轮：执行轨迹训练出更好的路由器和框架原生模型，从而改善成本-质量权衡，并在相同预算下生成更多轨迹。我们在OpenSquilla中实现了这一思想，包含四层路由栈、一个开源的LightGBM冷启动排序器，以及一个分阶段的路由器-模型路径，能够将记录的竞技场数据逐步转化为更强的路由策略。本报告在包括DRACO和PinchBench在内的智能体基准上研究了单模型与多模型路由，并论证了智能体路由不仅是成本控制手段，更是面向智能体原生训练的数据引擎。
